body:
Join our petition to Congress!
| **_BREAKING FROM NPR: Biden backs filibuster carveout for abortion rights_** | **|| URGENT PETITION TO CONGRESS ||**
[**We need 15,000 Democratic signatures to help President Biden and pressure the Senate to ABOLISH the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230211_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6360%2E878179%2EIBzJY7) | [**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230211_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6360%2E878179%2EIBzJY7)
---
_We’re thrilled:_ President Biden COMMANDED Senate Democrats to do their job and change the filibuster rules to codify _Roe v. Wade._

[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230211_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6360%2E878179%2EIBzJY7)
Mitch McConnell and Trump’s Justices are panicking, and they’re sprinting to pressure Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to keep the filibuster in place...
That’s why we’re racing to get 15,000 Democratic signatures by midnight tonight. If we fall short, the GOP will totally drown out President Biden – _we can’t let that happen!_

[**Quick: add your name to our petition demanding the Senate abolish the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230211_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=6360%2E878179%2EIBzJY7)

name: Joe Biden
subject: I mean it when I say I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of this country:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Folks, let's look at the results. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’re fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. | |
---
On Tuesday, when I stood in front of Congress and the American people, I said that we were readying the next chapter in the great American story -- a story of progress and resilience. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’ve fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. We've helped create 12 million new jobs. Because of you all, because of the American people. Folks, let's look at the results. The unemployment rate is at a 50-year low. We've funded thousands of projects that are going to put thousands of people to work rebuilding our highways and bridges all across America. We capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. We’ve made a lot of progress together. But we're not finished yet by any stretch of the imagination. **And we need to elect more Democrats to get more done. Now it’s time to _finish the job_ , Derek.** **Will you chip in $7 to the Democratic National Committee? That money goes straight to electing Democrats in all parts of this great nation -- Democrats who will deliver for the American people and rebuild our country.**

clean_body: Folks, let's look at the results. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’re fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. | | On Tuesday, when I stood in front of Congress and the American people, I said that we were readying the next chapter in the great American story -- a story of progress and resilience. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’ve fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. We've helped create 12 million new jobs. Because of you all, because of the American people. Folks, let's look at the results. The unemployment rate is at a 50-year low. We've funded thousands of projects that are going to put thousands of people to work rebuilding our highways and bridges all across America. We capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. We’ve made a lot of progress together. But we're not finished yet by any stretch of the imagination. And we need to elect more Democrats to get more done. Now it’s time to finish the job , Derek. Will you chip in $7 to the Democratic National Committee? That money goes straight to electing Democrats in all parts of this great nation -- Democrats who will deliver for the American people and rebuild our country. I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of America, Derek. I mean it. We’re a nation with a strong soul, a strong backbone, and a strong people. We just have to remember this and remember who we are. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together. If we join together to build an economy for working people, cap the cost of insulin for everybody, and stop the attacks by Republicans to cut Social Security and Medicare, we can finish the job and build a better nation. We have more to do, but I know we can get it done if we support our party and elect more Democratic leaders who are committed to progress. This is our moment, Derek. I’m really counting on you. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. | | NEGOP Legislative Update for Week Ending February 11, 2023
The stakes continue to be raised at the Capitol with a record number of testifying constituents, strong statements on the record from elected officials, and bills beginning to move out of committee to the General File (preparing for floor debate). In the later days of February, the number of bills being advanced out of committee will begin to accelerate. We must be ever vigilant in reviewing legislation because many important bills surrounding the operations of the state continue to move forward (with critical amendments), but receive much less fanfare or discussion. This week, the bills that received most of the media attention were the “Let Them Grow Act”, the ESG (Environmental, Social, & Government) investments of the state, marijuana bills, and more. We need blue-collar, white-collar, plaid-collar citizens (yes, that means YOU) to continue to show up. We need fresh faces that have not been engaged at the testifying level of THEIR government to take action. To counter our large crowds from all across the state that have been in attendance, opponents have begun to BUS in out-of-state speakers to fight our 2023 common sense agenda. This means someone from NY or California could be testifying in NEBRASKA as to whether boys can go into girls bathrooms, testifying on YOUR property tax legislation or, YOUR 2nd Amendment rights. Please consider testifying, attending, and writing to the Senators in support of key bills. 1,500 write-ins were noticed on a specific bill! The crowds have been noticed more! Video Tutorial: [https://youtu.be/ee2CDnZwdqE](https://www.ne.gop/so/98OP2ZCkp/c?w=hxi_fHi0FCGsHSIoXV74UOdYmUh2DYUShUs_IkfvyYo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9lZTJDRG5ad2RxRSIsInIiOiJhNmViODU0Ny04NzZiLTQ1ZWItYzU1OC03M2ViMDg2ZGM5ZWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ) William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative Director Written Tutorial: [https://forwardnebraska.substack.com/p/how-to-comment-on-your-bills?r=rb3iq&utm_medium=ios&utm_campaign=post](https://www.ne.gop/so/98OP2ZCkp/c?w=w7rFdQWcxNfn6YjHxYUvC2zJqADP1SFma1rAkkB4aDg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3J3YXJkbmVicmFza2Euc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvaG93LXRvLWNvbW1lbnQtb24teW91ci1iaWxscz9yPXJiM2lxJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09aW9zJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wb3N0IiwiciI6ImE2ZWI4NTQ3LTg3NmItNDVlYi1jNTU4LTczZWIwODZkYzllYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9) Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman
Onto your weekly update..... Second Amendment Constitutional Carry passes out of committee! ESG ESG continues to heat up. Your elected Republican officials, Attorney General Mike Hilgers, Former Attorney General Doug Peterson, and Treasurer John Murante have made pointed comments in the last several months on ESG. This week the Nebraska Investment Council heard testimony on why investing with ESG will financially erode industries in Nebraska. Last year the investing actions did not change even after citations. In 2023, more pressure is being applied. We anticipate the heat to grow even more as citizens and their retirement investments become affected. Unfortunately, there is no definitive timetable put into motion to change the investing choices of the state. However, three bills have advanced forward to limit the power of ESG over our economy. Senator Holdcroft and Kauth have one bill each being heard on Monday in committee. Already Senator Slama’s bill, to ensure our State Treasury funds stay out of ESG banking firms, has been heard. ESG continues to be a growing theme across many areas of state government. Attorney General Hilgers joined a lawsuit with 24 other states to block a rule designed around ESG guidance. Addressing Federal Government Ineptitude Attorney General Hilgers also joined other AG’s around the U.S. to designate Mexican Cartels as Terrorist Organizations. This proper designation, gives authorities the ability to take new aggressive actions to stop the effects of Cartels, including drug trafficking of fentanyl and other extreme drugs, sex trafficking, and the corruption they are causing our state and country. Natural Resources A significant investment into the Perkins Canal is moving forward rapidly. The Governor, along with the legislature, continues to bring importance to this project in an effort to secure water rights established in an existing legal compact with Colorado. The AG continues to be involved in preserving water rights for all Nebraskans via this compact between the two states. The party continues to support this effort to preserve our water rights which are critical to all aspects of Nebraska life. Life The party apparatus continues to participate in discussions with Senators behind the scenes on moving key pro-life legislation forward. We have received and appreciate the calls of concern at the state party headquarters on pro-life. Numerous conversations bringing many points of context have taken place on the bills and there is a path to succeed on SIGNIFICANT pro-life legislation in 2023. This will be a defining vote of the 2023 Unicameral session. Education After five years, we are seeing the first school choice bill for scholarships move out of committee. This is a first step toward the school choice movement that continues to gain steam as parents seek opportunities for their children. It is imperative we continue to engage the topic of competition to improve the testing results of all children as well as empower parents. Last week’s Parental Rights bill was well received and went over better with Senators than originally expected after deliberation. The outpouring of support from the general public is making a big impact. We are keeping a close eye on the progress of the bill to ensure school systems observe the rights of parents in being the primary driver of education for their children. Breaking News: The topic of Governor Pillen seeking to eliminate the Constitutional Officers of the State Board of Education brings much discussion and debate. In essence, consolidating the current Constitutional elected power of the SBOE to the Executive branch (Governor) is being studied by the members of the party in context to our Platform Values. Broadband In another elimination of Constitutional officer authority, Governor Pillen is seeking to eliminate the Public Service Commission’s control over broadband expansion. The PSC currently has jurisdiction over broadband expansion (and other infrastructure) and this remains a top priority of the party as well. This week LB 683 was debated that would create a NEW office in state government and come with an ADDITIONAL director and NINE new staff members. This bill would replace the authority of the Constitutional officers of the PSC in their oversight of the deployment of Broadband. Many are arguing the change will cause significant delays in the roll out. The PSC believes it has already staffed appropriately to achieve this goal. However, complaints of the ineffectiveness of the PSC in the past (sidenote - there has been significant changeover in PSC elected officials) and “Too many cooks in the kitchen” at the PSC have been the reasons presented to eliminate the elected positions. Proponents believe a streamlined approach from a new office of government is a better way. The party is confident in the “What” and “Why” of broadband deployment, but there is significant debate on the “How”. Stay tuned as the discussion continues. There are conversations from within the governing bodies of the party to bring a resolution on the concerns of changing Constitutional authority and creating new government positions to solve an infrastructure issue. Let Them Grow Act Senator Kathleen Kauth wins the "Attendance/Testifying event of the Week" Award by seeking legislation that would address concerns around gender transition for minors. Genital/Breast Mutilation & Hormone Manipulation, puberty blockers hormone therapies, and surgeries were addressed in this bill. Proponents testified for hours. Opponents bussed in many people (including out-of-state) to testify against this bill. The most alarming stat is...kids who have received these treatments were found to have attempted suicide 19 times the normal rate of other kids. We are grateful for Senator Kauth’s commitment to protect life and engaging an issue that many shy away from in the public sphere. Healthcare Senator Murman brought forward a bill to protect medical practitioners, healthcare institutions, and healthcare payers from discrimination, punishment, or retaliation as a result of any instance of conscientious medical objection. Protecting the conscience of the provider is important in preserving the rights of those in our healthcare community. The debate was extensive and opponents came from the Pro-Choice crowd who were upset that Doctors may have a choice due to conscience. Intangibles A lot of great effort has been made by all parties involved in legislation. Passionate but respectful debate has been a welcomed culture change. We encourage the citizens to continue to engage. We thank the Senators and their amazing aides for their commitment to conservative values. We applaud and appreciate the extraordinary amount of time invested in the 2023 session. We continue to encourage a respectful and professional tone with opponents of our position and we are thankful for peaceful participation. Below is our list of supported bills. We are grateful for our Republican Senators working hard to see Constitutional and conservative values through. Please pray, encourage, and continue to attend these important meetings to improve our State.
Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director

clean_body: For Your Situational Awareness Highlighted BILLS this NEXT WEEK : Monday, Feb. 13 LB730 Banking, Commerce and Insurance/Location: Room 1507 | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT/WEEKLY UPDATE"February 11, 2023 | | | | | | | For Your Situational Awareness Highlighted BILLS this NEXT WEEK :Monday, Feb. 13 Banking, Commerce and Insurance/Location: Room 1507 Time: 1:30 PM Banking, Commerce and Insurance Location: Room 1507 Time: 1:30 PM the Investment Neutrality in Public Funds Act Education Location: Room 1525 Time: 1:30 PM Adopt the Sports and Spaces Act Wednesday, Feb. 15Health and Human Services /Location: Room 1510 Time: 1:30 PM Provide procedures for directed health measures Thursday, Feb. 16Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Location: Room 1507 Time: 1:30 PM the Personal Privacy Protection Act Health and Human Services Location: Room 1510 Time: 1:30 PM certain activities from disciplinary action under the Uniform Credentialing Act NOW IS THE TIME TO FILL THE SEATS OF THE "2ND HOUSE"! | | Get Our Second House Alerts | | | | | | | NEGOP Legislative Update for Week Ending February 11, 2023 The stakes continue to be raised at the Capitol with a record number of testifying constituents, strong statements on the record from elected officials, and bills beginning to move out of committee to the General File (preparing for floor debate). In the later days of February, the number of bills being advanced out of committee will begin to accelerate. We must be ever vigilant in reviewing legislation because many important bills surrounding the operations of the state continue to move forward (with critical amendments), but receive much less fanfare or discussion. This week, the bills that received most of the media attention were the “Let Them Grow Act”, the ESG (Environmental, Social, & Government) investments of the state, marijuana bills, and more. We need blue-collar, white-collar, plaid-collar citizens (yes, that means YOU) to continue to show up. We need fresh faces that have not been engaged at the testifying level of THEIR government to take action. To counter our large crowds from all across the state that have been in attendance, opponents have begun to BUS in out-of-state speakers to fight our 2023 common sense agenda. This means someone from NY or California could be testifying in NEBRASKA as to whether boys can go into girls bathrooms, testifying on YOUR property tax legislation or, YOUR 2nd Amendment rights. Please consider testifying, attending, and writing to the Senators in support of key bills. 1,500 write-ins were noticed on a specific bill! The crowds have been noticed more! Video Tutorial: William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative Director Written Tutorial: Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman Onto your weekly update..... Second Amendment Constitutional Carry passes out of committee! ESG ESG continues to heat up. Your elected Republican officials, Attorney General Mike Hilgers, Former Attorney General Doug Peterson, and Treasurer John Murante have made pointed comments in the last several months on ESG. This week the Nebraska Investment Council heard testimony on why investing with ESG will financially erode industries in Nebraska. Last year the investing actions did not change even after citations. In 2023, more pressure is being applied. We anticipate the heat to grow even more as citizens and their retirement investments become affected. Unfortunately, there is no definitive timetable put into motion to change the investing choices of the state. However, three bills have advanced forward to limit the power of ESG over our economy. Senator Holdcroft and Kauth have one bill each being heard on Monday in committee. Already Senator Slama’s bill, to ensure our State Treasury funds stay out of ESG banking firms, has been heard. ESG continues to be a growing theme across many areas of state government. Attorney General Hilgers joined a lawsuit with 24 other states to block a rule designed around ESG guidance. Addressing Federal Government Ineptitude Attorney General Hilgers also joined other AG’s around the U.S. to designate Mexican Cartels as Terrorist Organizations. This proper designation, gives authorities the ability to take new aggressive actions to stop the effects of Cartels, including drug trafficking of fentanyl and other extreme drugs, sex trafficking, and the corruption they are causing our state and country. Natural Resources A significant investment into the Perkins Canal is moving forward rapidly. The Governor, along with the legislature, continues to bring importance to this project in an effort to secure water rights established in an existing legal compact with Colorado. The AG continues to be involved in preserving water rights for all Nebraskans via this compact between the two states. The party continues to support this effort to preserve our water rights which are critical to all aspects of Nebraska life. Life The party apparatus continues to participate in discussions with Senators behind the scenes on moving key pro-life legislation forward. We have received and appreciate the calls of concern at the state party headquarters on pro-life. Numerous conversations bringing many points of context have taken place on the bills and there is a path to succeed on SIGNIFICANT pro-life legislation in 2023. This will be a defining vote of the 2023 Unicameral session. Education After five years, we are seeing the first school choice bill for scholarships move out of committee. This is a first step toward the school choice movement that continues to gain steam as parents seek opportunities for their children. It is imperative we continue to engage the topic of competition to improve the testing results of all children as well as empower parents. Last week’s Parental Rights bill was well received and went over better with Senators than originally expected after deliberation. The outpouring of support from the general public is making a big impact. We are keeping a close eye on the progress of the bill to ensure school systems observe the rights of parents in being the primary driver of education for their children. Breaking News: The topic of Governor Pillen seeking to eliminate the Constitutional Officers of the State Board of Education brings much discussion and debate. In essence, consolidating the current Constitutional elected power of the SBOE to the Executive branch (Governor) is being studied by the members of the party in context to our Platform Values. Broadband In another elimination of Constitutional officer authority, Governor Pillen is seeking to eliminate the Public Service Commission’s control over broadband expansion. The PSC currently has jurisdiction over broadband expansion (and other infrastructure) and this remains a top priority of the party as well. This week LB 683 was debated that would create a NEW office in state government and come with an ADDITIONAL director and NINE new staff members. This bill would replace the authority of the Constitutional officers of the PSC in their oversight of the deployment of Broadband. Many are arguing the change will cause significant delays in the roll out. The PSC believes it has already staffed appropriately to achieve this goal. However, complaints of the ineffectiveness of the PSC in the past (sidenote - there has been significant changeover in PSC elected officials) and “Too many cooks in the kitchen” at the PSC have been the reasons presented to eliminate the elected positions. Proponents believe a streamlined approach from a new office of government is a better way. The party is confident in the “What” and “Why” of broadband deployment, but there is significant debate on the “How”. Stay tuned as the discussion continues. There are conversations from within the governing bodies of the party to bring a resolution on the concerns of changing Constitutional authority and creating new government positions to solve an infrastructure issue. Let Them Grow Act Senator Kathleen Kauth wins the "Attendance/Testifying event of the Week" Award by seeking legislation that would address concerns around gender transition for minors. Genital/Breast Mutilation & Hormone Manipulation, puberty blockers hormone therapies, and surgeries were addressed in this bill. Proponents testified for hours. Opponents bussed in many people (including out-of-state) to testify against this bill. The most alarming stat is...kids who have received these treatments were found to have attempted suicide 19 times the normal rate of other kids. We are grateful for Senator Kauth’s commitment to protect life and engaging an issue that many shy away from in the public sphere. Healthcare Senator Murman brought forward a bill to protect medical practitioners, healthcare institutions, and healthcare payers from discrimination, punishment, or retaliation as a result of any instance of conscientious medical objection. Protecting the conscience of the provider is important in preserving the rights of those in our healthcare community. The debate was extensive and opponents came from the Pro-Choice crowd who were upset that Doctors may have a choice due to conscience. Intangibles A lot of great effort has been made by all parties involved in legislation. Passionate but respectful debate has been a welcomed culture change. We encourage the citizens to continue to engage. We thank the Senators and their amazing aides for their commitment to conservative values. We applaud and appreciate the extraordinary amount of time invested in the 2023 session. We continue to encourage a respectful and professional tone with opponents of our position and we are thankful for peaceful participation. Below is our list of supported bills. We are grateful for our Republican Senators working hard to see Constitutional and conservative values through. Please pray, encourage, and continue to attend these important meetings to improve our State. Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director | | | | | Legislative Bills 2023(Bills with hearings the week of Feb 13-Feb 17 are highlighted in yellow and tagged with the NEGOP subcommittee each represents) body:
| | | Ben Shapiro has a lot of great things to say- but this might just be the best thing he's ever said:

_**" Shout out to Ryan Girdusky who is doing an excellent job with the 1776 Project PAC which is designed to take back school boards on behalf of conservatives. I am planning on giving some money to the 1776 Project. I think a lot of other people should as well because, without an enormous amount of resources, they are flipping school boards all over the country." **_ **\- Ben Shapiro**
---
My name is Ryan Girdusky, I founded the 1776 Project PAC and over the last year and a half, I have been traveling the country, working with conservative school board candidates who are determined to take back our schools from the crazed radical left. **In ONE YEAR we have already flipped over 100 school board seats from liberal to conservative!** _AND 70% of ALL the candidates we 've supported have won their races._ Peter, the ONLY way to save our children from leftist indoctrination and Critical Race Theory is to take back our schools, one county at a time. And we've proven that, with your help, we CAN and WILL do it. **[Will you join the movement to take back our schools from the ground up with a donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312010:66DE9DGNW:m:1:3331421248:7F9AB5C01E914FACB8B59E137B74B637:r)** For too long our schools have been run by people who hate our country and don't share our values. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the pric
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._[**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6en5s55vcm2en1gm24h6ephhdhpqqvspobpm6p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015.But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.That's the bad news.But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David.The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn72jj0h7pqvb6n01r8blpvd28qj6flkh2j9m5o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.[**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjsuk4gc81vlq7cbhsdhpfkd8muh34lmireifjk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage.Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though.Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv95kktb2vdriaepl6jo3el8rnmfhnimaurto4do_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0lu9vptp9n5hf9tjrojqmapa01k1duf4nfvkj38_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0245vdi88i8298gmc0fbmauqa2q07phsi2aqr7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztpoc6rmmr214d7vqhui3ias2tmi55tpevrg890o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: This Week in Indiana's Black History...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah _
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq**
Former Candidate for U.S. Senate **This week in Indiana’s Black History: On February 18, 2022, during Black History Month, the first two African American women to run for U.S. Senate in Indiana, Haneefah Khaaliq and Dr. Valerie McCray, were sadly removed from the ballot by the Indiana Election Commission members: Paul Okeson, Suzannah Wilson, Karen Horseman, and Litany Pyle. ** **The Commission refused to list their names on the ballot after the women’s signature collection counts were brought under scrutiny and challenged by fellow Democrat, Attorney Scott Yahne of Valparaiso, IN. This was the first time in the state’s history where a Democrat had challenged candidates from his own party. ** **It was later discovered that Mr. Yahne was a close friend and ally of Thomas McDermott, Jr., Mayor of Hammond, IN, who became the Democratic Nominee for the 2022 U.S. Senate race. ** **McDermott’s campaign manager Kevin Smith had stated earlier that they would be looking very closely at the women’s signature count in an effort to clear the way for McDermott. ** **One of the women: Khaaliq, sued after an investigation revealed a staff member of the Commission, Matthew Kochevar, had been paying into McDermott’s campaign. But first, Khaaliq was steered to the wrong court by Commission staff member, Angela Nussmeyer. ** **Nussmeyer improperly informed Khaaliq’s campaign to file the appeal of their decision in the Indiana Court of Appeals. But the court refused to hear the appeal. Khaaliq then sought transfer to the Indiana Supreme Court. This court also refused to hear her appeal. Khaaliq finally filed in the Marion County Superior Court, where Judge Patrick J. Dietrick refused to hear her appeal and dismissed the case on February 8, 2023. ** **To date, Khaaliq has not been afforded her right to an appeal from the Indiana Election Commission’s decision to remove her from the 2022 ballot. Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information. ** **Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Former Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate**
---
|
---
I was a strong candidate in the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Indiana. Check out my documentary [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=005b19d275&e=a49cb82bb3)!

name: Ben Carson Book Release
subject: Ben Carson signed his new book just for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Hurry claim your signed copy before 11:59 PM

|
---

Hi there Friend. Have you seen this exciting news?

name: Tim Scott
subject: If you only open one email today, I pray it’sthis one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0jvgv4e47jdtini4s4b1fsm6vnjt7qcs5maubf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4cth2bs "Generic Button")
---
Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2lgopl5587v9l78l7ujflv8tbi6e25joav98sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4cth2bs "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z859eddbvlbsdui5erqe5m49cd4dr2v49nvfgun8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4cth2bs)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsn3vgcgin287jjllne310qrenesua0qajck4c4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4cth2bs "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---

---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zirkbl19710cdao86l8t01mon0rcv77q58a3a268_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvpkfndco3jnid5iecpda040hpe8m4jr8aoffl7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgh91iv9udb564efatceh47jbhbqhnok84kpb45o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zanl2s26jkjovjm1sv5tn0bni6bna5naina2l7sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101”
| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znbatvin6a52m7jvs4bu3bqir997saoaf3r2dcfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh2qh5tnugu15d4dqhfm9dr37984iohfsv5543k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or2c5h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7or2r447mb76hgl8kt5hbc62jnl800ol6lamplo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or2c5h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: With a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Not sure if you saw my briefing Tuesday night

| |
---
| | | I write to you with a heavy heart. Not sure if you saw my briefing Tuesday night - but I'll be blunt. I come bearing some bad news:

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z10qiadnl6bvmbt7gkmnk70q3hknfqei4orr1ohg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zicil6ulk0f2c429hd16g7hifcnoio22de9r8kko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs3fohkso2oa62amtib331sihlq1udmjvjrpc9eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z776fvoclct48k9npas5reb7sius8bb7lup6gecg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbsmvkufhtecv8vgosijhutbn0q6pt2etpv5v6rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57hut597aqabijprrovgi15huh7l0tj8957ilg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ff4ehq3fu2hgo44md1pjj4jvhupgjo2bocvg30_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlsiqncamdjdrqrmtuflm8uglohkhelrhr88npk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z29sloestkg9bqpd5krrn2qtelh5bcvvioaispk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr96im37gfua4tn1cp570jeqoqlmh5hqcqm9mlko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc0s40968uh53n8gpeus9i0kmr5p2m57720fdm68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlf27vltrn3th8ohha88k9pshok1hjad5lur23do_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or4c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1unupt9d0mcof5obga7cebfvothb9er45q5s8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeonq4f8n4d74n83ctgkvb6f7ioeho701iqgt2ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8j6962h2fi8365i21a8dlos45nibnsdl7n4hsmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt1h45bsqumoe0bige3pdraotcmomul5ut52s5v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z99nesutuucsirrj63cu9k3sn7vkirlfr2ll5lm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8lgkt6k1i7lfr84hprjhbkdcngrbna3t9lqfoj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkgrah2psk61dh91rjjm0an3cm87plmobt263t68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmnv4o7svj6fh3cq31stdb82c9c6ooehb96t6el0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3chie9or6c9h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

In the radical left’s America, Washington taxes you and lights your hard-earned money on fire, but you get crushed with high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and our children are taught to hate one another on account of their race, but not to love one another or our great country. name: American Action News
subject: A free video series about the Inklings
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defense

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs2912bpth1qhqfah05clkajf5ohe6da11535n20_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6coj4cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaicfei7evh0f4ugkbedsi3clvrekk3lbt3ji9lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6coj4cth2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlkp30j7gg9obv0lt73mktif4dtqf3q7uplhhppo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6coj4cth2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkkcaegfs20hkn6lelhms3s6bmr650692niak3uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6coj4cth2bs)**

---
| |
---

name: American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkmhdaerld4moh3n7gvc5nkuedask1fp55jv492o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6ao34clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zan7tg0ceh7jlrk6ekutn13phbv0a12mejbphr8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6ao34clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlqq4bm211uq5ld3u08m1t94fuoj4ae831uhjpug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6ao34clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zldnihu2frnslt3hkq00ok7ghaoo6be64tt2rtpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g6ao34clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden’s agenda

| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

subject: Be one of the first
body:

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7068%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=vFbErNKLuXa4ngfGaddd9w&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06596%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x3slphEmLtMk4MsCxrJ4TA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06596%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x3slphEmLtMk4MsCxrJ4TA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty -- the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06597%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gy%2bHoJJVKy%2fwDvXAzqy7Lg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5knu607krng2bbqo6d6ubu2a8mt82juj5dgi0pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrmoagi7qq3vvai8ek71b7unskhcfer85sklvg7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3q1qth9ng3fhp13lt26e2dmqa4i3eq5n1q4fjo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztofr8o3jrau8dnaap3mttr9slcdmn8kn6lmgrl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zch2dgpmmi1dr3fv8glpnhdte5i1m4huark7gk2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ahqst7l488192ldnaoc4qa17qqagjigbr49n9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqkmnpo49b8vtbfpomo8o0ooaviu1s02c7nl2vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z555ou6be3m65kgvgmr8evf5h7f1sp2kcrmohi08_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z80an8hh9m9je71kintbq0h8025i4lvhupmph2fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8a12p4m9ejvljdiep3ug9sebecrb270q8tjagao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc2u96c5emtjhp4pn1mk1k5fd8051t97mehsuvng_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zspnb73ktp0r2g45j7hd7r5dttjg6hv012ovcei0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9g66o74clh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Friend, President Biden is furious that Congress hasn't banned ALL of your guns yet. So he told ATF to do whatever it takes to restrict your rights and put millions of gun owners in the crosshairs. And now, just days ago, the ATF filed a MASSIVE, 238-page gun control regulation that will take effect in days... Unless you stand with us and ACT NOW. FPC works on the literal front lines of the 2A fight to defend YOUR rights and property. [**Friend, will you add your name right now to Firearms Policy Coalition's petition to Congress, telling our elected officials to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda?**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

**If history is a guide, this year we could see gun-grabbing politicians try to impose:**
* A BAN on all semiautomatics
* A BAN on standard-capacity gun magazines
* A BAN on buying guns without a permit
* A forced REGISTRATION of all firearms
* An expansion of "red flag" CONFISCATION
* And more

These anti-gun bills could soon be dropping without warning. And We the People must speak up and tell our elected officials to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda before these dangerous policies get traction. [**Please add your name to FPC's urgent petition to Congress right now.**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

That's why our grassroots-powered movement to defend the Second Amendment, the Constitution, and your natural rights is more important than ever before. [**If you're on the side of FREEDOM, the CONSTITUTION, and the SECOND AMENDMENT, please sign your name to Firearms Policy Coalition's urgent petition to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda right now.**](http://trk.libertyledger.) FPC is leading the fight to STOP anti-gun laws that infringe on the natural rights of peaceable people like yourself. While our opposition is well-funded by billionaires and special interests and has ARMIES of government lawyers, Firearms Policy Coalition has something they don't: freedom-loving Americans like you. This year could shape the future of the Second Amendment and YOUR rights for generations to come. [**Please stand with FPC in this important legal battle -- show your support by signing our petition to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda right now.**](http://trk.libertyledger.) Stay free,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Only 9 days to this special House election in Virginia, where Jennifer McClellan is running against a MAGA extremist who thinks Trump really won the 2020 election. She’s doing her part with her campaign knocking on doors, making calls, buying ads, and doing everything they can to remind voters that there’s an election coming up. She needs our support in this final stretch. Can you help?
body:
Add a House seat in 9 days?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec207d37-1800-4548-a2d2-28e4369e4691/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you gotten a chance to join us for this one? You probably have a lot going on (we get it!) and we know it can be hard to keep track of it all if we don’t catch you at just the right time. And this off-season race is important, because ... [**We Have Less than Two Weeks To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2d4b0d9-ac40-44c2-b4ae-9db428d71b99/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In 10 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b4ecc59-6bbe-44b1-9fda-74805a558417/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ **_We must ensure that in 10 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not this nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a7e2f24-77fb-4189-b2b6-bdbcbc30ed8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. subject: That was atrocious…

body:
| |
---
| | | Have you ever had really good seats to a really bad sports event?

Patriot, this is Speaker Kevin McCarthy. I had a front row view of Biden's Socialist Manifesto, and heard nothing but lies, attacks, and even more progressive policy promises...

Now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS as a result today so they can continue running this country into the ground.

So, we have a choice to make. We can give in to Biden's lies and destructive plans, or we can fight for the America we know and love. I know where I stand...

**Here 's what I'm _NOT_ going to do: I'm _NOT_ going to tear up Biden's speech and make a scene like Nancy Pelosi did to President Trump.

I'm going to fight like _HELL_ as I promised the night I was elected your Speaker of the House. The question is whether you're ready to stand with me.**

---

---

The Democrats & the media think you'll do NOTHING as Biden & his corrupt cronies create RECORD inflation, legalize crime in our streets, open our borders, & let China invade our skies. They're counting on _your_ inaction.

**I need you to stand with me NOW against these shameless SOCIALISTS:**

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1544%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Px2HDIcvU4Yp90MlgqzTUQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659772%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xlm5G9qN9b58jz%2b%2f%2bXYhGQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659773%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9nsl5EFvXSxHXYcu%2f9kH9w&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659774%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y5hVgah0LJP4%2b7GZ1O%2bBUg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659785%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0qVoKUiRbqnFcC9ZQFs%2b7A&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1544%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Px2HDIcvU4Yp90MlgqzTUQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1544%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Px2HDIcvU4Yp90MlgqzTUQ&sysid=1)
