subject: Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuou840td24897g226tqo9k14fav49gjdedf6348_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob3cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udrb4p3me3j62tdi65qrepllmpirbc3jc3jr6opgmhp66orjc5q68cr4mli30ptnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhe2qr2o3mc1j3ao5lmdjr1db5e8iv0)

| *Sponsored Message* | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8qo1dnqdl9a6ch7dol5k6nfkk05ai8pijitkoqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob3cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5qq2u4rplvp4b1es7b81o5ovl46kvfnk9b12q28_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob3cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5gk760dun9eglaracjeqhpd12vqr8ljvv3lgiig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob3cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdl7l5dolm928abt7cuoc50eirmop6quao8cd6fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob3cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu6vcorruraudi6hp4g2i7l3o1v5o414uilpo2oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqjd3imsnoca7k5dhgm8544491mkb6lgpqnsegco_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob2cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8943te03fvhl61jogb9rn411ke3q8hhqapngmf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob2cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zhpqrpv155vke3mo8et7kjgu0s68mpsc31l90uro).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zar85fgg15hjf5jjd2pn4hf9p5km27jitl0c4g90_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cdh68o31c9ie49fg)

That’s what I’d say if you spent USD50+ on a brand new Smith & Wesson Folding Knife -- like the one below.

Why would I say that?

Because you could’ve just gotten the ** _exact same knife_** [for FREE from my friends at _American Blade Club._](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11578/6374453/55197c5997b97b416677c6fa402f9bdd6ab9fd05/ee023cb71dbb9106311a589ba1218cee3a1e452b)

**You want this knife.**

Even at the normal price of USD50+... it’s a steal.

The 5.3 inch High Carbon Stainless Steel blade is **razor sharp** and holds an edge like no other...

It includes an instant-open “finger flipper” so you can deploy the blade at a moment’s notice...

And the fact it costs USD0.00 for you today is another huge selling point. ;)

**FAIR WARNING:** They don’t have an unlimited number to give away.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6cd791ov283hhr59ktip1tuhv8b940bqgvakt00_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob4cth2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ohrgnojn9as7s8gfbk53irq9dntkb9blgpojvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob4cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgq79proj306odaniscbhsbtj107neiaa68eqspo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob4cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: Never Give An Inch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fei0b3g3op3ppb9vup2t7god9bk2169sed166g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob4cjh2bs "I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?")**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm46727i4v92jvsrusl78dvhhe58jigis42uidg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob4cjh2bs)
---
| | | [Claim Your Signed Copy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zloea8sr7pjnf1umgr4mgsc8hgvbkn2cs4ivh48g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c9i60ob4cjh2bs "Claim Your Signed Copy")

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| February 12th, 2023 | Issue XLVIX
---
| |
---
---
| | | Senator Rob Ortt Joins Officials in Niagara County To Push for Bail Changes After Arrest of Scammers Who Impersonated Police In Attempt to Steal Thousands From Local Residents
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ma0sytdcnkVWjHC4o6we09zEo_F0k2NJmr-lVThvadgVsr8_Y0iXCgDn3DOsW87CNUy_pUyDywlKvW9OE3MTii0uJOrRRIyotWRqD_xyziKySdHD6lH-7Tp0ZpA4_trMj1DiNW9irpimZ6MKk529jUDv4H_nyjpOxeI2JM44jGtCQOSFjnpDtICR4lihd8_i_mugs6kSXWN7U_YT_MksEk3meYpCGPAxmIKjN-1VLcaetPkS-tJajQ==&c=63dECkmXY41d1y2j0rN4Emf0Svtg0HTXKa0dGRrRb1w0VU_71RmpcQ==&ch=6a43tmk134RvnLQnikO9SmxDyKoxR0rjr5-wXL1eC5F1y07ijb2aIw==)
---
(From L to R: Sheriff Filicetti, Senator Ortt, Assemblyman Morinello, and Assemblyman Mike Norris)
---
"First and foremost, I want to commend the North Tonawanda Police Department for their outstanding work in quickly apprehending these scammers and saving a victim from losing tens of thousands of dollars. Who knows how many other unsuspecting victims have fallen prey to their impersonation of law enforcement. This incident is a perfect example of how our state's bail laws have failed the residents of New York State. The presiding judge being able to hold these individuals on a federal detainer for a short while, but now these two men that are here illegally to begin with, have been released back into the community to potentially do more harm," said Senator Ortt.
Leader Rob Ortt, Assembly Members [Angelo Morinello](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ma0sytdcnkVWjHC4o6we09zEo_F0k2NJmr-lVThvadgVsr8_Y0iXCgDn3DOsW87CEw2CDCY7l4IAuHAaSYOdCKfeGO9KEVDdQ9Ob-kuL6ZLzeKvUByL1Z4De7BdzI8NkS_0Ilo1BQvfygKWTyBkpW8p5qErikvipi2W8lwSRnaJIcwo0gxHcFgsWCdySS844EZ2eehA1-CrnsC5Dumj0VzCPsJRWChjVopfo84jfPW5eBChU0bVxbu16sgLRxyoyJBEXJmG0QjjN4CaOIARVYvf7edeVcZMzzyxLIxaXW7WYz-6tphOLzJ02k1wvBRExOGy6raP5qUGQOekt3KW4zinKKFBjebQfbMdyWQ7lOOSCWLHqtCbsFdCXq7-yI8-9ZUiymfUm1dTTrUUN_9kqS0boSZXBtjjRuA3J1qV9_MtDQkbHkXWCarko8H4Y5AjBLNflVqJqWpLrd031aAy9oi1zJrXm3iPiz7rEj4qMhkq7XNGw1NqehKVPJex78kXY&c=63dECkmXY41d1y2j0rN4Emf0Svtg0HTXKa0dGRrRb1w0VU_71RmpcQ==&ch=6a43tmk134RvnLQnikO9SmxDyKoxR0rjr5-wXL1eC5F1y07ijb2aIw==) # PolitiFact Fact-Check
## Electrical grid requires investments if natural gas use decreases

Gov. Kathy Hochul's plan to reduce natural gas usage in New York state has caused a flurry of criticism, especially from Republicans in the state Legislature.

Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt, R-North Tonawanda, during a news conference with Republican colleagues, blasted the plan, claiming that replacing natural gas-powered heating systems with electricity won't lower energy bills. That's because of the investment that would be needed in the electrical grid and in buildings to convert from a natural gas heating system to one powered by electricity.

"There needs to be investment in the grid," [Ortt said](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ma0sytdcnkVWjHC4o6we09zEo_F0k2NJmr-lVThvadgVsr8_Y0iXCgDn3DOsW87Cu6Sf2tEtPY1RseXYdzjQ2VPMd2PgfBlx8hJ-1FEjjluaancSYTlCW2hHLwEM6xTN1BzTExUnyKqr5ggvnoe2ljQkr4XsFs0rKg_7HbVJFFAX7JBih2AJIXbjFt4_XqenXbbnnxvEB9w=&c=63dECkmXY41d1y2j0rN4Emf0Svtg0HTXKa0dGRrRb1w0VU_71RmpcQ==&ch=6a43tmk134RvnLQnikO9SmxDyKoxR0rjr5-wXL1eC5F1y07ijb2aIw==). "The grid today can't handle the increased electric load. Don't take my word for it. That comes from National Grid, the people who run it."
| [Read Full Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ma0sytdcnkVWjHC4o6we09zEo_F0k2NJmr-lVThvadgVsr8_Y0iXCgDn3DOsW87ClYrwT5PBcGpmCGlz2jSAkcEV9IphAqVIpdZ2PlWw_O2qJZahzWU94wJ6FogBmi6sqWUmPcJ-kcl0NjcFBMbWd27tR0XBGyMrvBrYC0FB59bMlZBwAMes3Gd4DZ1n4h57lCrN1K07UXXhkcoamjmtOorY3XAfspAL6JOMCOeaD-C4c_hd5BnkiFYgqIWzftIu75BVJnKBOOOc3lpP5-PeuQ==&c=63dECkmXY41d1y2j0rN4Emf0Svtg0HTXKa0dGRrRb1w0VU_71RmpcQ==&ch=6a43tmk134RvnLQnikO9SmxDyKoxR0rjr5-wXL1eC5F1y07ijb2aIw==)

clean_body: Sunday, February 12th Edition | | | | == | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: | == == == | Weekly Newsletter | February 12th, 2023 | Issue XLVIX | | | | | Senator Rob Ortt Joins Officials in Niagara County To Push for Bail Changes After Arrest of Scammers Who Impersonated Police In Attempt to Steal Thousands From Local Residents == (From L to R: Sheriff Filicetti, Senator Ortt, Assemblyman Morinello, and Assemblyman Mike Norris) "First and foremost, I want to commend the North Tonawanda Police Department for their outstanding work in quickly apprehending these scammers and saving a victim from losing tens of thousands of dollars. Who knows how many other unsuspecting victims have fallen prey to their impersonation of law enforcement. This incident is a perfect example of how our state's bail laws have failed the residents of New York State. The presiding judge being able to hold these individuals on a federal detainer for a short while, but now these two men that are here illegally to begin with, have been released back into the community to potentially do more harm," said Senator Ortt. Leader Rob Ortt, Assembly Members == and ==, and == == called for changes to the state's bail laws after two alleged scammers - in the country illegally - were released back into the community. | == | | | In The News: | | | == ---|--- | PolitiFact Fact-Check Electrical grid requires investments if natural gas use decreases Gov. Kathy Hochul's plan to reduce natural gas usage in New York state has caused a flurry of criticism, especially from Republicans in the state Legislature. Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt, R-North Tonawanda, during a news conference with Republican colleagues, blasted the plan, claiming that replacing natural gas-powered heating systems with electricity won't lower energy bills. That's because of the investment that would be needed in the electrical grid and in buildings to convert from a natural gas heating system to one powered by electricity. "There needs to be investment in the grid," ==. "The grid today can't handle the increased electric load. Don't take my word for it. That comes from National Grid, the people who run it." | == | | Events: | | Leader Ortt joined the == for their 59th Annual Dinner this evening. The attendees had the opportunity to hear from keynote speaker Robert King, who discussed the importance of education and supporting America's youth while creating policies that push our students to be better. Thank you to Chairman Don Mazzullo for putting together another great event this year. | | | | Senator Rob Ortt out supporting fellow Senate Republican conference members (top to bottom) Deputy Minority Leader Andrew Lanza, Senator Joe Griffo, and Senator Pam Helming at their receptions in Albany on Tuesday evening. | | | From Social Media: | == | | | Rob Ortt is a Battle-Tested Leader Defending You in Albany! | | == | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: This Morning on Fox & Friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
Friend,

Happy Super Bowl Sunday! We started our day here in Phoenix joining Fox & Friends to highlight how there's an Army Officer on each of the final two Super Bowl teams - and then we discussed the recent national security concerns with China's aggression.

Today, current Eagle's offensive lineman Brett Toth and Chiefs linebacker Cole Christiansen - both West Point graduates - represent the best of our Warrior class. When Brett Toth isn't suiting up for the Eagles, he helps teach Army ROTC cadets at Temple University.

We also discussed the third aircraft shot down over America - and now Canada - and the need for our nation to unite together in the face of Chinese aggression.

If you could cheer for our beloved Eagles - and click below to help push out these tweets, I'd appreciate it.

subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4286eab632f46fca0baf4f55169642f&_e=-Chlsoy66lkmYvzbyCjA9B4cqOInbDKMpqcUHwO6whKPclYriJl_Wf37Ix2EeZ_IXJu01GzXFKEIzcND6pzGgKQk5krfWO384pnbMaKIfudmjv-5Y54kPwx_u5qVxTdJYPUIf7k1zY5Sx32b6TyeerRmWANq4VSP7osWKsYerx__XkfNhW2ExtWVdhA1M8AO22xRKtfAPbF1l4MR1d8Wc57pYMqyv7uUxH-UjVoNVIYkP6SiCmMUibXbM_t3KAz6HaiMqE8lIaXDCuaP9IkSspvG-QK1nc2B1tyKVBIZW8eweuDge7TN7jbPrb2CrIyBma9z4VYiiQx-jp1RsZOfKg%3D%3D)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4286eab632f46fca0baf4f55169642f&_e=-Chlsoy66lkmYvzbyCjA9B4cqOInbDKMpqcUHwO6whKPclYriJl_Wf37Ix2EeZ_IXJu01GzXFKEIzcND6pzGgKQk5krfWO384pnbMaKIfudmjv-5Y54kPwx_u5qVxTdJYPUIf7k1zY5Sx32b6TyeerRmWANq4VSP7osWKsYerx__XkfNhW2ExtWVdhA1M8AOgOg3KOzrMrQ9GCl4IKD6YqTeD98cPcUuV5I2IQeGr5iNy4qyCRM43jhMgfn_2yxZ5HemiCpyIyAp4df_nbiBvRWP93MSOG-RvwtMVknla6D3WbhQ1pgOJXY1aKkuEnuxUTCZja9kwl_oWqtf8nxToA%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4286eab632f46fca0baf4f55169642f&_e=-Chlsoy66lkmYvzbyCjA9B4cqOInbDKMpqcUHwO6whKPclYriJl_Wf37Ix2EeZ_IXJu01GzXFKEIzcND6pzGgKQk5krfWO384pnbMaKIfudmjv-5Y54kPwx_u5qVxTdJYPUIf7k1zY5Sx32b6TyeerRmWANq4VSP7osWKsYerx__XkfNhW2ExtWVdhA1M8AORtkPtn7MzVZDNM8mQu_tKRYplJJ6m31QY1MtALzBux01C0N4KBhxFKwOc8ybyRCRKsD9R3PPs546XiHOcwnrQCbebvGR2PCAPHBr125vWQhakiGln4Hd3jHsOIL32FuI9adC_I_p17aJ6D9gM3e6TA%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4286eab632f46fca0baf4f55169642f&_e=-Chlsoy66lkmYvzbyCjA9B4cqOInbDKMpqcUHwO6whKPclYriJl_Wf37Ix2EeZ_IXJu01GzXFKEIzcND6pzGgKQk5krfWO384pnbMaKIfudmjv-5Y54kPwx_u5qVxTdJYPUIf7k1zY5Sx32b6TyeerRmWANq4VSP7osWKsYerx__XkfNhW2ExtWVdhA1M8AOI9jx73p2DRXqJ1ScNTFCDvymJHpIFp94xmuOX-W-uFUPUM1h7PaeFcRwMmN44QKo22iP10wVBMiA71o3OOS6uCHVHMWMCBtjIaM0yZf_Q6V5UilHwxq03NH3MMll8bplMMGixZh8QttIpLrVjJOQ8w%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4286eab632f46fca0baf4f55169642f&_e=-Chlsoy66lkmYvzbyCjA9B4cqOInbDKMpqcUHwO6whKPclYriJl_Wf37Ix2EeZ_IXJu01GzXFKEIzcND6pzGgKQk5krfWO384pnbMaKIfudmjv-5Y54kPwx_u5qVxTdJYPUIf7k1zY5Sx32b6TyeerRmWANq4VSP7osWKsYerx__XkfNhW2ExtWVdhA1M8AOfwBaNF7DWLG7PMRcScobM-AZyXFjdciFPbmGNbDqZHsDRFfw3XXsh4IUS3MvkyJqNIAs2bN-l3G6UxE8AWrKF2-axmJeG3I19CLah3iNdsKNiLgso52Upa9Z6kbSJ61FvMxUvsIoAIaWlnCtEE2VLQ%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee02df0b7c274c6cbcf695b927fc0dd1&_e=uwN5nQ3YsT-E706k395CEJ4r6Lye0jf3s9C3Jk6Y6PSt8jYNb1X9HjiKugzhapYIE8kXyBKO_9ov9mYQMmNjvtQnYQE7EOYiBDerBajmeHokryd1tsTiKTyYgQEWjHM3YR2xKWtMn0LKfGIHCUDsAyrQgV3UJ2uH6uex_g2uflzSSW4oRnoRMCBR_nAIov5i9vG4_5S33VQQVoOxV2HJJPsnBy5aS6eMdb0mAE2taeI-zPqn1RCgKRCgz285rGuUaBQplNawm6S5Thya4zhpMAy2SF6tnNqyZS-kgQD9UChDYMvVrOimOE56GeSvJcHw8HqfCZzulPqwgx1Hw9k1VWqR0Z1bbdqTrplSJW-xsRuHNGPcLVHlWOpDmrrPJRveZv9lxUrQHBonRengRG_7hQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee02df0b7c274c6cbcf695b927fc0dd1&_e=uwN5nQ3YsT-E706k395CEJ4r6Lye0jf3s9C3Jk6Y6PSt8jYNb1X9HjiKugzhapYIE8kXyBKO_9ov9mYQMmNjvtQnYQE7EOYiBDerBajmeHokryd1tsTiKTyYgQEWjHM3YR2xKWtMn0LKfGIHCUDsAyrQgV3UJ2uH6uex_g2uflzSSW4oRnoRMCBR_nAIov5i9vG4_5S33VQQVoOxV2HJJPsnBy5aS6eMdb0mAE2taeKEKokkAO_qncTAiA_Yna74SHsHb41LXKCtzcaE21HMctr55nzUAdBNZAtN9AjUgjZp5fjyuTnYOB29Rmi97BiJ1j5OtqzNkXqSdTS-fuxUJHCOwah0GbxjrC2pUquBmcyncLBF2FqqMKlb1zVg_ujFVoSvpShHYbp8ytQ9zirltQ%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee02df0b7c274c6cbcf695b927fc0dd1&_e=uwN5nQ3YsT-E706k395CEJ4r6Lye0jf3s9C3Jk6Y6PSt8jYNb1X9HjiKugzhapYIE8kXyBKO_9ov9mYQMmNjvtQnYQE7EOYiBDerBajmeHokryd1tsTiKTyYgQEWjHM3YR2xKWtMn0LKfGIHCUDsAyrQgV3UJ2uH6uex_g2uflzSSW4oRnoRMCBR_nAIov5i9vG4_5S33VQQVoOxV2HJJPsnBy5aS6eMdb0mAE2taeKTyXvNUbNJI43Q-8B5gzGFNL25zEk49oyTe9pPU-HGVa4VHiU3F2Poz-gse-uw8ggA8e6K1XwIwIAVh3q0-ry2JyYWMeG0kCc3rjTFftHcdi2gwKo0UuLKQQwanIoSsimFdekJaJe92Myhc_IU_3UKKdTVF8R7mfRZ2B2kjh4kmQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Defend The Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=ee02df0b7c274c6cbcf695b927fc0dd1&_t=IvaHSFiI-5_F4UOEGW6IBUq6HUQze8Geprwebvd5fMgRwD-12jQQQq7OB8738AB-aWwbKu47BS7FzRw3K1esgeU3yQZ_ItdflhA-L1VV9VZZUK4KHxIO5bO9Zmxd5y1-1orjyYkiE8DZKK_l4Cj5-2TXWR8YcMEdBQ5T5r9IFmk%3D)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I’m not easily insulted, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter, I can’t overstate the urgency of this situation. Marjorie Taylor Greene just launched the first attack ads against me as the Democratic Leader in a dishonest smear to distort my record. [**I’m not easily insulted – but when extremists fan the flames of hostility, you have to believe I’m going to respond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58622155/391697806/1662333042?refcode=20230212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWY1OTQ3YS1mMmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-Q3dYFS0Fy9ate73FHYNs66uRifZ1fQVjTX9GjEWik=) [_**To counter these attacks and defend my Democrats, I just launched my own ads to set the record straight. Because, Peter, attack ads are only going to come at us more and more. Democrats must be prepared to respond quickly to get our message out there. So I just launched my first wave of ads as your Leader, and I’m hoping you’ll help me raise 500 gifts before midnight to fund them. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58622157/391697808/1662333042?refcode=20230212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWY1OTQ3YS1mMmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-Q3dYFS0Fy9ate73FHYNs66uRifZ1fQVjTX9GjEWik=) Peter, I’ll never back down from extreme MAGA Republicans who lie to the American people. Especially not one who has promoted violence and armed insurrection. This is just one of many reasons why we must take back the House. In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

name: Team Swalwell
subject: SIGN ON: We must pass the Justice in Policing Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
The House stepped up and met this issue head-on, and now it's time for the Senate to do its job and pass this bill as soon as possible. Without it, our country remains in the same status quo that allowed the loss of life for Tyre Nichols, George Floyd, and Breyonna Taylor and countless others. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58624026/391704079/-557856831?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQzMTA2MS1mN2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBEK11bETmfr3pcnq8QDo-REg7Zn2wB4UTYM9fQK6no=)
Team, In June 2020, I joined my colleagues in passing the Justice in Policing Act, and every day this bill waits for a vote in the Senate is a disservice to the American people. While this bill will not fix everything, it is a good step in ensuring that more Black Americans do not die at the hands of those sworn to protect and serve. _On January 7th, 2023 in Memphis, TN police officers severely beat 29-year-old Tyre Nichols during a traffic stop. Nichols died three days later from his injuries,_a tragic and unnecessary death_ at the hands of the police. Passing this bill in the Senate is just one way we can honor his life and recommit as a nation to doing better._ **[Will you sign our petition demanding that the Senate bring the Justice in Policing Act up for a vote now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58624027/391704080/-1433919193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQzMTA2MS1mN2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBEK11bETmfr3pcnq8QDo-REg7Zn2wB4UTYM9fQK6no=&emci=f59d15f1-8ea9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6b431061-f7aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58624028/391704081/-1433919193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQzMTA2MS1mN2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBEK11bETmfr3pcnq8QDo-REg7Zn2wB4UTYM9fQK6no=&emci=f59d15f1-8ea9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6b431061-f7aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
---
The Justice in Policing Act brings much-needed reform to the way we police in America, and would end systemic violence against Black Americans. It would **demilitarize police forces, ban chokeholds, make lynching a federal crime,** and so much more.
The House stepped up and met this issue head-on, and now it's time for the Senate to do its job and pass this bill as soon as possible. **_Without it, our country remains in the same status quo that allowed the loss of life for Tyre Nichols, George Floyd, Breyonna Taylor and countless others. _**
**The American people have made it clear that we NEED policing reform. And now - once again - the only thing standing between our country and meaningful change is inaction in the Senate.**
[**Team — That is why I’m asking you to help us make it happen. Will you use your voice and add your name to our petition right now demanding this bill is brought up for a vote as soon as possible?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58624029/391704082/-1433919193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQzMTA2MS1mN2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBEK11bETmfr3pcnq8QDo-REg7Zn2wB4UTYM9fQK6no=&emci=f59d15f1-8ea9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6b431061-f7aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58624030/391704083/-1433919193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQzMTA2MS1mN2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBEK11bETmfr3pcnq8QDo-REg7Zn2wB4UTYM9fQK6no=&emci=f59d15f1-8ea9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6b431061-f7aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)

While this bill will not fix everything, it is a good step in ensuring that more Black Americans do not die at the hands of those sworn to protect and serve. On January 7th, 2023 in Memphis, TN police officers severely beat 29-year-old Tyre Nichols during a traffic stop. Nichols died three days later from his injuries,a tragic and unnecessary death at the hands of the police. Passing this bill in the Senate is just one way we can honor his life and recommit as a nation to doing better. | The Justice in Policing Act brings much-needed reform to the way we police in America, and would end systemic violence against Black Americans. It would demilitarize police forces, ban chokeholds, make lynching a federal crime, and so much more. The House stepped up and met this issue head-on, and now it's time for the Senate to do its job and pass this bill as soon as possible. Without it, our country remains in the same status quo that allowed the loss of life for Tyre Nichols, George Floyd, Breyonna Taylor and countless others. The American people have made it clear that we NEED policing reform. And now - once again - the only thing standing between our country and meaningful change is inaction in the Senate. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We have to stop this medical malpractice
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7060%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=EjhgQgyPzb37vjUtIPzzWA&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ruxl6WRK4oXMA7SDROU5EA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ruxl6WRK4oXMA7SDROU5EA&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06541%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X5B%2bxyNJqhCDPzCra8xMJQ&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06542%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tGix9KOiAcOctRzX%2fhjq5w&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ruxl6WRK4oXMA7SDROU5EA&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06543%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6cYcAmzozqPDnCkUbGXVxA&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06544%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e5qG%2bCEq%2bFwRnBGRPiXJxw&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06655%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2QH2gH9BOl96RUoxPwCmiA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06656%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0rpyos4E7r2dmbjC8A%2fG1w&sysid=1)
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94655ff5900c4f62b538617c533be454&_e=zNTt5U3hWCfz3R81CciKuj_0eqmAwp7iHJec8xbvI38fTSj4jF8pwH9uo8l6xD0WdPg5vksDx6hsqq3F4wWXTd61aOE2Ku2FgQxEI5dalz_ADG5v6MthdGZD2m1I9O7Xz8Qdd0qcwCfr-OI3lY430ycEz5TIy0jwN1dKPI0KaxfMs9-lgOwHWPQzMAi36pJzxMeEaC4t9j3RM9yrhIpKfaowk9OvUJd5NQ9UFx-80kuUsj85723uY8_Uoin_MzNtCQSP6b8CtBbXFLhCrOwN8kC82m0o6zTtl1Ra3b5_hSw%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94655ff5900c4f62b538617c533be454&_e=zNTt5U3hWCfz3R81CciKuj_0eqmAwp7iHJec8xbvI38fTSj4jF8pwH9uo8l6xD0WdPg5vksDx6hsqq3F4wWXTd61aOE2Ku2FgQxEI5dalz_ADG5v6MthdGZD2m1I9O7Xz8Qdd0qcwCfr-OI3lY430-vQZ4PP4izD4trGqghGtmMlTb9-Tr3BwuTJs51lq-nim_Fh0_Pg9xWi9cdtTw07reCwy3pd78Vq4sIJoNew9uwyR6gX5MHVmhA-6ndJHUBRFudh7PTI_aLoDGDmVckNeZtpZoXPYF8wwtv865TID_A%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94655ff5900c4f62b538617c533be454&_e=zNTt5U3hWCfz3R81CciKuj_0eqmAwp7iHJec8xbvI38fTSj4jF8pwH9uo8l6xD0WdPg5vksDx6hsqq3F4wWXTd61aOE2Ku2FgQxEI5dalz_ADG5v6MthdGZD2m1I9O7Xz8Qdd0qcwCfr-OI3lY43064_YlvlW9hMtWpzVKD5ZucDE-OPH6Ll_zwTuN4_tu5I32iZPMkhJrqGOt3v4POOS6Y8NcP3BY0i97J4oySmuaZ0eDpFsecT5MLb_1YcZmrgbZN_52ey_F-8uYMum4L0WTSKR73GabQy_HbYF0bC4BU%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

clean_body: Friend, It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. name: Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=929839815ffa4678810374061bb02be2&_e=Jt592A3sMC8Qi1YNde8XTgWkVw8jiofdxP-2rxSDozguepn2NEtA4cQFzsbGg1gKnxvMOORVQOgmk_JwPhZoIVsPBKxCQrOuPdgADV-9babckCfPL3ls8xJ_p3eHfQaZejvZ1JrxcO_uDRnDUchd-pIiOSlOxI-a-bghff__QbluwV0CHvQB5498L7wQ5UGh6B8N0M5Jpb0KKGxp0QMB73ny78AKDmGQG5HMtE5v_g6cLroPKeNS2bjxyoZbM9cosIyR66GTpwyU7FW9utFeZOUVV1FKhQaCsKk-bMXkfxg2dAMUAbOsPSXSMo_VJtTtBqVSSPAHatrV5cT0CPedLpDBedNJB5wUeE7rtev-MsevJmR0NtuCgU7GzY8Roe0ttEeyPpRvTOEQ6K72B4MjTzMSpKK6qpN0Gu3Q0OXq3ybmeV7qgTGKtFKABD4KYmD2)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=929839815ffa4678810374061bb02be2&_e=Jt592A3sMC8Qi1YNde8XTgWkVw8jiofdxP-2rxSDozguepn2NEtA4cQFzsbGg1gKnxvMOORVQOgmk_JwPhZoIVsPBKxCQrOuPdgADV-9babckCfPL3ls8xJ_p3eHfQaZejvZ1JrxcO_uDRnDUchd-pIiOSlOxI-a-bghff__QbluwV0CHvQB5498L7wQ5UGh6B8N0M5Jpb0KKGxp0QMB73ny78AKDmGQG5HMtE5v_g6cLroPKeNS2bjxyoZbM9cosIyR66GTpwyU7FW9utFeZEJpMq8pXuuXQ7d_9gWcugRUumrLIApbhrbujSA8bvwkf3nzEx6vlBWe4K1XhTjyIE-9KantnWGOEysK7x2ZS53EwmWK7pRY4FjiJbj5HH89l_tlFZF2UqA7Do8_PPcoxuMX-Ak4BSyk_jh-qqKZyR3KtW-kUGCE2qdXsguWQSvn)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=929839815ffa4678810374061bb02be2&_e=Jt592A3sMC8Qi1YNde8XTgWkVw8jiofdxP-2rxSDozguepn2NEtA4cQFzsbGg1gKnxvMOORVQOgmk_JwPhZoIVsPBKxCQrOuPdgADV-9babckCfPL3ls8xJ_p3eHfQaZejvZ1JrxcO_uDRnDUchd-pIiOSlOxI-a-bghff__QbluwV0CHvQB5498L7wQ5UGh6B8N0M5Jpb0KKGxp0QMB73ny78AKDmGQG5HMtE5v_g6cLroPKeNS2bjxyoZbM9cosIyR66GTpwyU7FW9utFeZEoRbiJbUiJ2AMh_XAcG4s0iK8hzbobTwCKFqdDviu-om1rrjB3qAmAGFNkp1YyikMHme3bmnGU21_dGLFuvZDIygSEeWvMLENLFXoiDvVFVGayhjouHlAIvpk1kqC0E5PCSXL48BFXDjGCodVeoTHuE-088phmRXr3rskExjTQw).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Hillsdale College

Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3fe55eff9ee4fb6868bd834b690b4e1&_e=FhmKuwiFeTM0LVaxlWTwV6VMY8TX60i9IegmRWYEysbqgn6JnPA5U2Bq_zzZd2e9iL0xTgVImUbxU2_Vy4qzKO1rom3BAjJhMtbSBgzlHTK_O0HRVTZFK1Ff5NHk5y-YdqX5SmT0ZfO51ptevCLTWMy-qbIdlXfFKSM1i0pCsGtcejPg1gp8UYch2lBR5ztKOBJow4JXolFW1L1Agnqvf9xPZTJxNdST-0IMJijVYsA-M24xgXal55vOtHBGOpsT1Di8OVBh3zWQbbchaeDIOq1eShNPj8HHnCo7_JylGseM7vkIF8EVfl_ejckOJy5n3AkXSt2SZhtMRidaeRv5LwzPsF0B-rmQf9ubpIm3pPh_5VaX0t_LfpLTITVTobxBSQPXZ5FqaeyAU9Z9gBZJTQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3fe55eff9ee4fb6868bd834b690b4e1&_e=FhmKuwiFeTM0LVaxlWTwV6VMY8TX60i9IegmRWYEysbqgn6JnPA5U2Bq_zzZd2e9iL0xTgVImUbxU2_Vy4qzKO1rom3BAjJhMtbSBgzlHTK_O0HRVTZFK1Ff5NHk5y-YdqX5SmT0ZfO51ptevCLTWMy-qbIdlXfFKSM1i0pCsGtcejPg1gp8UYch2lBR5ztKOBJow4JXolFW1L1Agnqvf9xPZTJxNdST-0IMJijVYsA-M24xgXal55vOtHBGOpsT5sMH5jQiB6G6P4ZlGdG2ZgdVJ7fVXkTOZc29x_a7mY-Jb-AmmGS7hTiI_KUVs9woMgD6M7yWpTMtCOBrAQlv6ib9GDDtlOYn2jgu1ruxctrKr2ZOD-pJpn943e8CBovtdibyy429HibBgxy73CbHbQ%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3fe55eff9ee4fb6868bd834b690b4e1&_e=FhmKuwiFeTM0LVaxlWTwV6VMY8TX60i9IegmRWYEysbqgn6JnPA5U2Bq_zzZd2e9iL0xTgVImUbxU2_Vy4qzKO1rom3BAjJhMtbSBgzlHTK_O0HRVTZFK1Ff5NHk5y-YdqX5SmT0ZfO51ptevCLTWMy-qbIdlXfFKSM1i0pCsGtcejPg1gp8UYch2lBR5ztKOBJow4JXolFW1L1Agnqvf9xPZTJxNdST-0IMJijVYsA-M24xgXal55vOtHBGOpsTnQtZa3wgRVeRDekJ9HASEG1WWtYZkeASQTQq-K220h3tbujFvPwb7mi3kCrPlDBt66ptxE4rRc8u2xAd-_QY0fljIPsau2-LBVZQldixCRRFPxIry3Z-uf0A_EliieKPDMrsQYgnDUpRhI31TaBwFA%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312054:JjiXFDGNz:m:1:3299561967:29A3B71D5BC0A29016DA7074E39146C6:r)
---
| | [PROMISES KEPT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312054:JjiXFDGNz:m:1:3299561967:29A3B71D5BC0A29016DA7074E39146C6:r)
---
| | [STAND WITH US](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312054:JjiXFDGNz:m:1:3299561967:29A3B71D5BC0A29016DA7074E39146C6:r)
---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask you to chip in any amount you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312054:JjiXFDGNz:m:1:3299561967:29A3B71D5BC0A29016DA7074E39146C6:r "Can I ask that
you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House
Majority?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH US](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312054:JjiXFDGNz:m:1:3299561967:29A3B71D5BC0A29016DA7074E39146C6:r)
---

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

---
| |
* * *
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Montana’s surging GOP has their eyes on Jon Tester’s Senate seat, and they might get it if Democrats across the country don’t step in to help him. They have a lot of advantages, but Sen. Tester has all of us, and our appreciation for his years of loyal work on behalf of working families.
body:
GOP Senate seat pickup?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f5b2677-024f-4551-ace8-1419f1c35d6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _We can't afford to lose Jon Tester’s seat in Montana, in 2024, or we lose the Senate. And 2024 isn’t as far off as it seems. The campaign season is already underway._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f80c145-2e7a-48b4-94d7-26d2d1f61535/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62c36d7a-01bb-4395-86e9-d2e0ed5cf580/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d80096c-3e6b-447e-9d0e-7dca92b00704/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te17c3062-aca3-41a5-9993-c5490a1e9c1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T914b298d-316b-4f0c-a559-74bc771349e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jontester4-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ef2f8e5-e690-4cbd-afbe-1e932449af0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=361f378a-e99e-4314-95fa-dd128b92f5e2&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=361f378a-e99e-4314-95fa-dd128b92f5e2&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here’s some radical transparency
#

Peter -
We are always going to be honest and transparent with you. We ask a lot, so you deserve that.
We have some news to share, and it’s not great. But it is 100% true. It’s not just some nonsense we are saying to trick you into making a donation today.
Here it goes:
Ever since Ruben’s launch, our fundraising has slowed down considerably. Here’s some radical transparency, this month we have only had 2 days with more than 500 donations. That is short of where we need to be.
Part of this is because of some technical changes Google made on January 31. It means less emails are getting delivered. For a campaign that relies on grassroots donations, that’s a killer.
And this is a problem because Kyrsten Sinema is starting to pick up her fundraising. She just had a big one last week before getting dinner with Kevin McCarthy.
So we’re hoping for a HUGE day today. Another day with more than 1,000 donations. Can you help us get there along with others chipping in to do their part?
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford today. We would not ask were this not so terribly important to our campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230212-1-7&t=1&akid=381%2E734936%2EvOB1DU)

subject: State Democrats uplift President Biden’s agenda, while state Republicans continue a losing streak …andeverything else you need to know in the states recently.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, February 12th, 2023 | | |

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' pro-criminal policies
body:
The 2023 legislative session continues and Democrats are doing exactly what we expected - sidelining Republican attempts to fix their failed policies. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490436:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

The 2023 legislative session continues and Democrats are doing exactly what we expected - sidelining Republican attempts to fix their failed policies. And as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Republican Representative Eric Robertson of Sumner joined us to discuss several bills introduced in the House aimed to make our communities safer. As a co-sponsor of the bi-partisan bill to repeal the disastrous restrictions which Democrats imposed on police pursuits in 2021, Rep. Robertson also provided his insights on the bill's progress. He wrapped up by sharing his thoughts on taxing cannabis products, providing tax relief to lower and middle income workers, and repealing the Democrats' poorly developed Long Term Care tax/plan. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490437:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r)**.**

**This week 's top story...**
The Inslee Adminsitration is - once again - failing to take on the mental health crisis facing our communities in a timely manner. The state government is facing backlash for the lengthly amount of time bureaucrats take to provide necessary licenses to sufficiently trained clinical psychologists. Many license applicants have complained that they spend months - and in some cases years - pestering state employees to move their paperwork through the process. In the attempt to defend themselves, Washington State Department of Health staff claim they do not have the necessary staff to process the mere 400 applications which are currently pending. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490438:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r)**.
**
**In case you missed it ... **
Republican - and even some Democrat - lawmakers have introduced bills to repeal and/or reform the anti-law enforcement legislation passed in 2021. These bills, including one banning police from pursuing suspects fleeing from the scene of a crime, have proved to be utter failures. As a shocking example, our state faces a massive 93% increase in car thefts. But that's not enough of a failure to convince far-Left Democrat Sen. Manka Dhingra - a champion of pro-criminal legislation - of these bills' failures. As the chair of the Senate Law and Justice Committee, she appears determined to prevent bills seeking to repeal or reform failed policies from gaining any traction. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490439:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r)**.
**
P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490440:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r).

AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by clicking [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490441:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r)!
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61490442:sRibxIDNl:m:1:2610672541:7D8FE83C672DA8B8F21D4CE916FF5412:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14135373&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osRibxIDNl).
---

| | Georgia Day is a time for us to celebrate everything that makes the Peach State so great. Today, at Fair Fight, we’re reflecting on the critical role Georgia voters have played in protecting our democracy. You may have seen recent headlines about Georgia potentially becoming an early primary state in upcoming presidential elections, and the Democratic National Committee’s recent vote to shake up the presidential calendar. It’s clear how important Georgia’s electorate is to the entire country, and how much power we hold when we make our voices heard as a collective. Here at Fair Fight, we know that states with early primary elections can make a difference as we choose our next president. But Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is against Georgia becoming an early primary state in 2024, once again trying to undermine the voters of Georgia. [_**This Georgia Day, we’re gathering signatures from all 50 states to demonstrate widespread support and appreciation for the Georgia voters who helped flip both the Presidency and the U.S. Senate, so we could pass landmark federal legislation. Show your solidarity by adding your name right away >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636458/391720693/-1430358425?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20220212_e_georgiaday_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20220212_e_georgiaday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmNlNGY3Zi0wZGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WSbO4hD-nhuOFeoQXRs1s-IS1rTf_Sd2euWm2Prwq0s=&emci=db70fb77-0dab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fbce4f7f-0dab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636460/391720695/-1430358425?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20220212_e_georgiaday_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20220212_e_georgiaday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmNlNGY3Zi0wZGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WSbO4hD-nhuOFeoQXRs1s-IS1rTf_Sd2euWm2Prwq0s=&emci=db70fb77-0dab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fbce4f7f-0dab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden’s agenda and I’m not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can’t do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---

subject: the Citizens United decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
The damage of Citizens United is clear, and we can’t wait until another election to overturn this terrible decision. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58618529/391684226/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWY1MzI1MS1lN2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4-2NED_o3mmcpJ0_uMCBINFr9EBGan8Ai92KGaUItcs=)
Folks — Just over thirteen years ago, the Supreme Court ruled on _Citizens United_ and gave billionaires an unfair advantage in American politics. Since that disastrous decision, our elections have been flooded with ungodly amounts of cash and inaction on the issues that matter most to Americans. Billionaires spent around $880 million on political campaigns in the 2022 midterms, most of it favoring Republicans who will gladly do their bidding. The dark money pouring into our elections is drowning out the voices of hardworking Americans like you. Many have lost faith and confidence in the democratic institutions that make up our government.
