Since that disastrous decision, our elections have been flooded with ungodly amounts of cash and inaction on the issues that matter most to Americans. Billionaires spent around $880 million on political campaigns in the 2022 midterms, most of it favoring Republicans who will gladly do their bidding. The dark money pouring into our elections is drowning out the voices of hardworking Americans like you. This constitutional amendment would overturn Citizens United and: Allow Congress to set reasonable campaign finance rules and limit corporate spending on politics; Strengthen transparency and ethics in our government; Put the power of elections back in the hands of the American people and out of special interests. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Senate Democrats are a firewall to the MAGA extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Sen. Schumer here.

I can never thank the members of this grassroots team enough for helping us defy the odds and expand our Democratic Senate majority in 2022 -- and every day, the GOP proves just how _critically important_ our majority is for stopping their far-right agenda.

Right now, Republicans are on a mission to attack reproductive rights, gut Social Security, and raise taxes on working families. **But Senate Democrats are standing firm as a firewall against their MAGA extremism.**

As long as I am Majority Leader, I will never let Republicans' ultra-conservative assault on our rights take hold. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP are only _two seats_ away from retaking the Senate and totally blocking President Biden’s bold agenda.

Defending our majority won’t be easy. Republicans are already raising millions to defeat us in 2024, and **we have to get started now to compete with their megadonors.**

[**So I’m personally asking you: Will you pitch in $5 or more to help Democrats defend the Senate? Standing up to MAGA extremism depends on us defending and expanding our razor-thin majority >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230212-ChuckSchumer-SchumerFirewall-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230212-ChuckSchumer-SchumerFirewall-Pros-sl1&akid=9746%2E9716520%2EsQy7LR)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Border city on the brink
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312081:6OlkSDGN_:m:1:3299561967:0BA4D8C4C692CE52B50412718EE729C5:r)
---

Border cities and towns are on the brink of collapse, and the Biden Administration has done **NOTHING** to help them.

Yuma, Arizona - a border town - has been _drowned_ by illegal immigrants. Between 2021 and 2022, Yuma saw an over 170% increase in border crossings!

Yuma County Supervisor Jonathan Lines is begging for a change:
_" Policies need to be changed when you see an unprecedented amount of people coming across the border that even supersedes what we saw under any of the other presidents for the past 30 years." _
Yuma's food banks have been so overwhelmed that the city is on the verge of food insecurity.

AND their hospital is so full of illegal immigrants that citizens can't get into it!

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312081:6OlkSDGN_:m:1:3299561967:0BA4D8C4C692CE52B50412718EE729C5:r)
---

The Biden Administration's disastrous border policies have created this mess, and it is going to take all of us stepping up to change it.

Will you join me in taking action today to help bring back the tough border security policies that worked during the Trump Administration?

---
| | [ END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312081:6OlkSDGN_:m:1:3299561967:0BA4D8C4C692CE52B50412718EE729C5:r)
---

With your support, we'll be able to save these border cities and reinstate the common-sense policies of the Trump Administration, but I need you to _**[ACT before it's too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312081:6OlkSDGN_:m:1:3299561967:0BA4D8C4C692CE52B50412718EE729C5:r "ACT before it’s too late.")**_

Fighting For Our Future,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312081:6OlkSDGN_:m:1:3299561967:0BA4D8C4C692CE52B50412718EE729C5:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

body:
On a grassroots team like ours, every dollar allows us to build out the campaign infrastructure we need to reach that one extra voter, knock that one extra door, and receive that one extra vote next November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58620425/391690983/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.12_b1_es_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWZiMzNjMy1lY2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_-UvubiJu35d4RXBipPyPVYtmgzcx7SM9qRGa1C0oY=)
Peter,

With leading election forecasters already calling OH-13 a _pure toss-up race_ , I’m going to need the full support of this grassroots team by my side – every step of the way – until next November.

**That’s why today, I’m asking for $1. Yes, really just $1.**

[**On a grassroots team like ours, every dollar allows us to build out the campaign infrastructure we need to reach that one extra voter, knock that one extra door, and receive that one extra vote next November. Peter, can I count on you to chip in $1?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58620426/391690984/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.12_b1_es_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWZiMzNjMy1lY2FhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_-UvubiJu35d4RXBipPyPVYtmgzcx7SM9qRGa1C0oY=)

Before we know it, right-wing dark money groups will begin to flood our district with millions of dollars, once again, in an attempt to mislead voters and flip this seat red.

**They may have millions of dollars in dark money, but we have something they don’t: The grassroots power of folks like you giving what you can, when you can because you believe that Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for.**

clean_body: On a grassroots team like ours, every dollar allows us to build out the campaign infrastructure we need to reach that one extra voter, knock that one extra door, and receive that one extra vote next November. = Peter, With leading election forecasters already calling OH-13 a pure toss-up race , I’m going to need the full support of this grassroots team by my side – every step of the way – until next November. That’s why today, I’m asking for $1. Yes, really just $1. = | = = Before we know it, right-wing dark money groups will begin to flood our district with millions of dollars, once again, in an attempt to mislead voters and flip this seat red. They may have millions of dollars in dark money, but we have something they don’t: The grassroots power of folks like you giving what you can, when you can because you believe that Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much. name: VoteVets
subject: Why donate 20 months before the next election? Please give us a chance to explain exactly why that is so important.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We get it.
#
Derek -
Sometimes it can seem like there’s no reason to donate to an organization like VoteVets 20 months before the next election.
We get it.
That feeling is probably a big part of the reason our fundraising has slowed since the last election.
But here’s why we need you.
VoteVets spent $24 million last election cycle. One of the largest outside spending organizations in all of politics. In large part, because we started out strong.
That allowed us to get involved in a razor-close North Carolina special election that happened early in the cycle.
It helped us connect with Veterans who were the target of disinformation in the run-up to the presidential election.
And an early start was a big part of the reason we were able to get involved in races earlier than many others to set the foundation for a few races that wouldn’t have won otherwise.
So we get the feeling. It’s early. And we hate having to ask for money this early.
But we need a bunch of people who understand how important that early money can be to step up and contribute today.
[**Can you please contribute $3 to VoteVets today? We need a lot of people who understand how important this early money can be in politics to chip in to help us catch up.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230212-1-15&t=1&akid=7347%2E3013755%2EvUwE97)

name: The Giffords Team
subject: Will you sign on to reject permitless carry in Florida?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Last week, extremist Republicans in the Florida legislature introduced dangerous permitless carry legislation that would allow nearly anyone to carry a gun in public—regardless of whether or not they’ve had any training or a background check.
We started a petition to show that we have lots of supporters who reject this dangerous legislation. But we’re still waiting on your signature.
[**If you stand with us in opposing permitless carry in the state of Florida, will you add your name to our petition today?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230212-1-30-nor&refcode2=4250.3935704.MN9jc7&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230212-1-30-nor&refcode2=4250.3935704.MN9jc7&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords
* * *
_Original Message:_
This week, extremist Republicans in the Florida legislature introduced permitless carry legislation—the same day a mass shooting took place in the town of Lakeland, Florida.
If permitless carry passes in Florida, this legislation would allow almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check, any training, or having ever fired a gun.
Rights like gun ownership come with responsibilities. Training, licensing, and a background check to carry in public is just common sense.
It’s normal practice for states to require a certain number of training hours to do a job or provide a service. For instance, Florida requires 1,200 hours of training to obtain a license to cut hair, 500 hours of training to obtain a massage therapist license, and 240 hours of training to become a licensed manicurist.
But if Florida passes permitless carry, the state will require **zero** hours of training for someone to carry a loaded firearm in public.
[**We need to show extremist Republicans in Florida that we disapprove of this dangerous legislation. Will you add your name to our petition today and join us in fighting back against permitless carry in Florida?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230212-1-30-nor&refcode2=4250.3935704.MN9jc7&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230212-1-30-nor&refcode2=4250.3935704.MN9jc7&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7)**
A variety of research has been conducted about the impact of concealed carry laws on public safety. A comprehensive study from 2019 found that in states with weak permitting laws, violent crime rates were 13% to 15% higher than predicted if these such laws had not been in place.
More states are bowing to the gun lobby and passing dangerous laws like permitless carry. At a time where nearly 43,000 Americans are killed each year from gun violence, this is unacceptable.
We need to fight for stronger gun laws, not weak ones that will allow guns to fall into the wrong hands. It’s going to take **_a lot_** of resources to fight back against Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and this dangerous legislation.
[**Are you with us? Sign on today to reject permitless carry in the state of Florida.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230212-1-30-nor&refcode2=4250.3935704.MN9jc7&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/feb23-permitlesscarry-pet/?source=em230212-1-30-nor&refcode2=4250.3935704.MN9jc7&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7)**
Thank you for using your voice.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4250%2E3935704%2EMN9jc7) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | Peter — did you see this news?

**Super Bowl LVII will be the FIRST Super Bowl to feature two Black starting Quarterbacks.**

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: We NEED to reinstate the federal assault weapons ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends, I’m a member of the Columbine generation - a group that no one ever wanted, or asked, to join.
I was ten years old when the Columbine shooting traumatized our nation, and like many other young adults, I grew up learning how to hide from potential shooters in school lockdown drills.
Nearly a quarter of a century later, it’s heartbreaking to watch as we pass that trauma down to the next generations by refusing to take action.
Kids now grow up knowing that the places they go every day - whether it’s their school, their grocery store, or their synagogue or church - simply aren’t safe.
I know I speak for my generation and the ones after us when I say that we can’t take this anymore. We NEED to reinstate the federal assault weapons ban.
If you agree, please join me by adding your name to this petition demanding action. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RcPp5P-D-EmdjTxPTooYGA2]
I’m not going to dignify the NRA’s propaganda talking points against this common-sense law by repeating them here - what I will say instead is that we know the assault weapons ban saves lives. We know because we’ve seen it before! The 1994 federal ban - implemented when I was 5 years old - decreased gun massacres by 37%. And when the ban expired, gun massacres rose by 183%.
The vast majority of Americans support common-sense solutions to gun violence. The majority of gun owners support gun safety policies. Even the majority of NRA members support universal background checks for gun purchases. Despite all that, too many elected officials still live in the pocket of the gun lobby, unwilling to take a single step that could save lives, lest they lose out on campaign contributions.
It’s atrocious, and we have to keep calling it out - and keep making it clear that the American people STRONGLY support taking action.
House Democrats have introduced the Assault Weapons Ban of 2023 , and I’m so proud to be an original co-sponsor. Please join me and back this life-saving legislation by adding your name here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RcPp5P-D-EmdjTxPTooYGA2]
Thank you.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

Derek, I’ve been thinking.

Last month, Kevin McCarthy kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee,
where I have served as Chairman and top Democrat for years.

Two days later, I kicked off my campaign to represent California in the
U.S. Senate.

And yesterday, we kicked off our California campaign with a rally in
Burbank, and a California for All Tour around the state starting today.

few bucks to kickstart our campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Candace Owens
subject: Do you know what month it is?
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc002d64dce54eaa9aafc04bb08189b6&_e=94I8FTxZ_EOez4KEs0geRvhqbLBOXR8haiZSjr8_75Phlzfty81O2GL0tyOY2kVF-LCmbVMoqvLn0Q2vs9pOsF-1aZ8yXziEiOcGPpbZsiFk2lxw0mq0uuUPJEn_ai_uDfVyaLufi_mco6qt4MF8DUojGaxyFERW7XSRzlzCjJd9WO98J7LRXL-8uvDBrlf2RQGCmMPvs0e43HQsbbS9dHQYAQh8AS6o-STVOLMzY66tV_BoMEQulRWJAIP5K6S4u7l2onF55QiJm8gBjpbpWQPfXoG6UGY5zciU_eaIigA%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc002d64dce54eaa9aafc04bb08189b6&_e=94I8FTxZ_EOez4KEs0geRvhqbLBOXR8haiZSjr8_75Phlzfty81O2GL0tyOY2kVF-LCmbVMoqvLn0Q2vs9pOsF-1aZ8yXziEiOcGPpbZsiFk2lxw0mq0uuUPJEn_ai_uDfVyaLufi_mco6qt4MF8DW4bTURdjvhIIPTja85SRsnxuHus2jLjzwnKzG1H_0UrKBIceQxTlj6OZpi7Q-ygj_0y-lkqK1hzgmkN9S9UecdBcv83Pu1ZVPKSHipwQwVBe7qcAVjYZjOdU-HVIMqBGYEMkd_JtO6DhSdd7Y6xgBk%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc002d64dce54eaa9aafc04bb08189b6&_e=94I8FTxZ_EOez4KEs0geRvhqbLBOXR8haiZSjr8_75Phlzfty81O2GL0tyOY2kVF-LCmbVMoqvLn0Q2vs9pOsF-1aZ8yXziEiOcGPpbZsiFk2lxw0mq0uuUPJEn_ai_uDfVyaLufi_mco6qt4MF8DWg18_u3cBOYsSgCXkmlfYrdtR2Iy4XiWELZHlyz_cCxJsFTVEBHsnRv70t3Axa2THGeMxu9ztbPIY8HXmNt3MAoaHu6HovAbH8XNTIqrTH7Jse64zNMGiovIoRQaE0SMeed7rHm_fdbUg9TuwKiXWY%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc002d64dce54eaa9aafc04bb08189b6&_e=94I8FTxZ_EOez4KEs0geRvhqbLBOXR8haiZSjr8_75Phlzfty81O2GL0tyOY2kVF-LCmbVMoqvLn0Q2vs9pOsF-1aZ8yXziEiOcGPpbZsiFk2lxw0mq0uuUPJEn_ai_u1MmXRl7wKL0bo5GrPYiRKtWkLUSFKZLu76wDS5yuRYH-F-wiunoDYyOSKpXo8DGQDzQk0I2Mv1otupxbvloBvXNFcmFnnMQDsBqaIBQ87_4xIbmhPKjv1BKRk6y-OMIi18Rqm7qmujG3I9106aiO6ZplKoomtGLdbeTwauZbEEY%3D)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58622833/391699977/665653053?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230211utility_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWI1NWYxYi1mNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7TdC1AcvytjBpAoVMd8Wy1kTpzpeODDGbUrwhKGS1g=)

Team, Though Democrats like myself are working hard to lower the everyday costs of living across the country, greedy corporations are continuing to price-gouge consumers any chance they can. Here in New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District, **gas prices have skyrocketed as high as 350% more than previous utility bills in Las Cruces and Deming** , with some folks receiving bills as high as $800. _That’s unacceptable._ Nobody should have to choose between putting food on the table or keeping their heat and power on. **That’s why I wrote to Symmetry Energy Solutions, demanding they work with Las Cruces and Deming city officials to lower these astronomical gas prices.** **[Join me in demanding this utility company do everything in their power to lower costs for New Mexican families: add your name to my petition here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58622834/391699978/-2076794596?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230211utility_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWI1NWYxYi1mNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7TdC1AcvytjBpAoVMd8Wy1kTpzpeODDGbUrwhKGS1g=&emci=b26b14df-f4aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=15b55f1b-f5aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58622835/391699979/-2076794596?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230211utility_gv_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWI1NWYxYi1mNWFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7TdC1AcvytjBpAoVMd8Wy1kTpzpeODDGbUrwhKGS1g=&emci=b26b14df-f4aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=15b55f1b-f5aa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)
---
The costs of living are high enough for families struggling to make ends meet. I will not sit by and watch energy companies price gouge the people of my district.
Thank you for joining me in speaking up,
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

name: Josh Harder
subject: puppies!
body:
Yes, I know today is supposed to be about football, but in my household we’re most excited about the hilarious Puppy Bowl. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58639000/391731874/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjQyYzU3NzItMWZhYi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUmScRq2zLBh3nP7dqUWrfJs4sy-XmKSSejmX1CmNj4=) | Hey Peter, happy Super Bowl Sunday! Yes, I know today is supposed to be about football, but in my household we’re most excited about the hilarious Puppy Bowl. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58639001/391731875/-1676763246?refcode=E20279-20230212-PuppyBowl-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjQyYzU3NzItMWZhYi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fUmScRq2zLBh3nP7dqUWrfJs4sy-XmKSSejmX1CmNj4=) This year, Team Ruff (orange) will be facing off against Team Tuff (blue). The best part? Every puppy is a rescue dog and will be adopted from a shelter or foster home. Pam and I have fostered dozens of dogs over the years and we can promise you, there is nothing that brings more joy and compassion than helping a dog in need. clean_body: Yes, I know today is supposed to be about football, but in my household we’re most excited about the hilarious Puppy Bowl. | = | Hey Peter, happy Super Bowl Sunday! Yes, I know today is supposed to be about football, but in my household we’re most excited about the hilarious Puppy Bowl. = This year, Team Ruff (orange) will be facing off against Team Tuff (blue). The best part? Every puppy is a rescue dog and will be adopted from a shelter or foster home. Pam and I have fostered dozens of dogs over the years and we can promise you, there is nothing that brings more joy and compassion than helping a dog in need. We have had so many laughs with our rotating cast of 4-legged house guests and couldn’t recommend it more highly! = = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Josh *

name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: I'm a top target for defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
FiveThirtyEight says the battle for Senate control could once again come down to Nevada
| | |
---
Friend: **With Nevada having just decided Senate control, experts at _The Hill_ report that the GOP is coming after me as a top target for defeat heading into 2024. I need your help to fight back and win.**
While Republicans are busy prioritizing the agenda of their megadonor allies, I have been working in the Senate to lower everyday costs and deliver critical progress to people in Nevada and across the country.

**AG Miyares Leads Multistate Letter Condemning Leaked Anti-Catholic FBI Memo **
---
---
_“Virginia is the birthplace of religious freedom and has a long history of protecting the inalienable right to live your faith free from government interference or intimidation. The leaked memo from our state capital’s FBI office is unacceptable, unconstitutional, and un-American. Frankly, it’s what I would expect from Communist Cuba. As Attorney General, I’m responsible for defending Virginians’ rights, and religious freedom is the bedrock of the Constitutions of the United States and of Virginia. Virginians should not and will not be labeled ‘violent extremists’ by their government because of how they worship, or because of their beliefs.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares **
---

**AG Miyares was proud to lead a coalition of 21 states in sending a letter calling on President Biden and Secretary of State Blinken to designate Mexican drug cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations (FTOs) under federal law. **
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c384b8d9eb1d4410b3e18da29ad8370d&_e=YeJRYvqtJdVMC4FLZYmea-XsEgEWiQv2SgnmZhaMHadvB1p9EaO1LRHNLSzNLKAEGXMRn-E5RLjPt5vjxGikX-Z9f643A7TY30Ptx1KlyyG-z73qpRvEAFLGa06z4LTEl_trIa5ay3nsqChzMaeFLg42ZElteQ6xLfi-iGWWxNPckR1gcF1nyggeCmE1oJlQHkQoCSOh_DsE1xwQMGeYd8DtIiIaXC3nzN-zUFwp-sA%3D "AG Miyares Leads Push to Designate Mexican Drug Cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations")
_“The Mexican drug cartels are trafficking fentanyl into our country every day, killing thousands of Virginians and endangering every single community in our Commonwealth. The threat these drug cartels pose is real and imminent – which is why this country must escalate its response. It’s time we stop ignoring them. Law enforcement agencies need every tool available to fight against this public health and national security crisis, and designating these cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations would be an important first step in confronting the gravity of this dangerous crisis.” _ **–Attorney General Miyares ** **Designating major cartels as FTOs will give state and federal law enforcement agencies increased authority to:**
* Freeze cartel assets,
* Deny entry to cartel members,
* Allow prosecutors to pursue stricter punishments against those who provide them material support.

---

While speaking to a group of Jewish leaders on Virginia Jewish Advocacy Day, AG Miyares announced the creation of a task force to combat antisemitism, as rates of antisemitic hate continue to rise in both the Commonwealth and across the country. The first of its kind in the United States, the Task Force’s mission is rooted in 4 interrelated strategies: monitoring, information-gathering, educating, and investigating instances of Antisemitism in Virginia. **The Antisemitism Task Force is in response to the recommendation of the** _[**Governor’s Commission to Combat Antisemitism report**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c384b8d9eb1d4410b3e18da29ad8370d&_e=YeJRYvqtJdVMC4FLZYmea2z_L_g19kuYvPAUYIvx8bfJjvQ028vCDrYxqTLMO7KQ9ohg6VgkrEr1cJNkXYDYIuYgyeYRcEaj_YSHKiqJW68wJAOnJG0Dz4sVDDeAafxtD_Sb2gedgfFX_TjQYUSi9Bc-_woIENnem2f71nF2pcz1LxwwrbRFIfgX5kRGhPF7USsnY_ZHiXrYbgGxrfPt23wPMFj-lwP8SGUpCafJm6ik-OQw3nVxN3z1ta-KzcopJ7HO_pny_aHUjbR-KlwF2ykIKdLE2W13o8QihR_euWW7zijj2kxgJbDouU9DFB5AzNIAyEWiHnfcD-gzgwmpZTyAbVrEhoOp8HadzvMvObc%3D)_**issued in December. ** _“Antisemitism is the oldest and most sustained form of bigotry known to mankind. Although America’s commitment to religious diversity and pluralism has made it a relatively safe haven for Jewish people, American Jews have dealt with horrifying antisemitic discrimination and violence, and it continues today. My Antisemitism Task Force will help our office monitor, combat, and educate Virginians about hate against Jewish people.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares ** **_Virginians should report any instances of antisemitic discrimination to Attorney General Miyares’ Office of Civil Rights. _**

On Tuesday, AG Miyares joined a 24-state coalition of attorneys general in sending a letter to Yelp opposing the company’s discriminatory practices against crisis pregnancy centers. Last year, Yelp began issuing consumer notices to the Yelp profiles of such centers, claiming that crisis pregnancy centers “typically provide limited medical services and may not have licensed medical professionals onsite.” Those consumer notices were applied to all crisis pregnancy centers but not to Planned Parenthood and other similar facilities – that is discriminatory. **On Thursday,****Yelp****responded to the letter and****agreed to back down****and stop making false claims that pregnancy centers are not medical clinics. ** **This is a huge win.** The new language will state: “This is a Crisis Pregnancy Center. Crisis Pregnancy Centers do not offer abortions or referrals to abortion providers.” AG Miyares enjoyed having a productive discussion with the **_[Youth For Tomorrow](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c384b8d9eb1d4410b3e18da29ad8370d&_e=YeJRYvqtJdVMC4FLZYmea-ZEzVMiOqrrY0qDz3lIci5BKhrnFdKHP56JOxwENFzoKsyr3tXV2qDrWUfo7AuWCXoOBLvhZmn_epjeH9Lt3qM5MeK_yNMNR5k8fXnReE00cEd6E2azBq81HVbsyeqa8dgr1qjvMGsGZugE0WtqaaSOQa8ms4IcJnMJMXCpuMUlQ5NpVKl-pewom-ObcZYJBg%3D%3D)_** team about the work they are doing with foster care, survivors of human trafficking, and behavioral health services.

**On Thursday, AG Miyares announced that he is joining 23 other states in filing a lawsuit against the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF), its director, and U.S. Attorney General Merrick Garland for – once again – overreaching their authority and infringing on Virginia’s constitutional rights. ** _“The federal government has a track record of circumventing the legislative process to promote their radical agenda. Instead of creating laws, the Biden Administration prefers to declare mandates through their unelected bureaucratic bodies, infringing on our constitutional rights._ _Pistol braces increase accuracy, stability, and make the firearm less concealable. The ATF had no problem with them for over a decade. And millions of law-abiding Americans purchased these braces in reliance on the ATF’s approval of them. Virginians shouldn’t be subject to additional regulations and potential criminal charges because the federal government has changed its mind about pistol braces, but doesn’t want to go to Congress.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares **

Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

| Crossover, February 7
---
|
---
| Tuesday, February 7 was Crossover. "Crossover" is the midpoint of session in the General Assembly, where bills passed by the House are considered by the Senate, and bills passed by the Senate are considered by the House.
604 bills, out of 1207 bills submitted in the House, advanced to the Senate. 538 bills, out of 810 bills submitted in the Senate, advanced to the House by Feb. 7.

| Success HJ 475 CTE Signing Day
---
|
---
| Success! My CTE bill, HJ 475, passed Senate Rules Committee! This bill designates the fourth Wednesday of April each year as "Career and Technical Education Letter of Intent Signing Day", to encourage public private partnerships with local businesses, and to celebrate those who graduate with a job or join the U.S. Military! My CTE teacher, Mac Beaton, seen here, taught me for three years in electronics, and had a huge impact on me back in the 80s. He is now director of CTE in Henrico County.

| Sage's Law Passes the House 50-48
---
|
---
| [HB 2432](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EWuf4mYAEEO74DR19b2qU1fclVcKG3eyioQHz8Ya08zktF7He_j8ca52laEj2XJJPu3COTUBdngM5JOtdeKZGG8EDsYyrA5OHin2-DS7pDhhBlrUdstBVhK-yDsxYAIg4eaF0YPRUYWMaoJ2QkvpuBVyhhm0T5sgYX6XqLgkCZW2Vyqt_bhKCQFP4bSk9p1VOHts_Tkv9xE=&c=Sp-t7E2gURMV5bxh6bT58sEhoIQxO8MpBcFTh31TSLXkSlQo4BKu_g==&ch=fybiUHY2KuKcrNTTYQoJFqbRb931qQhBwcxU3yv09D4S-ViP2ogBTw==), "Sage's Law," a bill I am chief co-patroning with Delegate Dave LaRock, just passed Full Education Committee. It requires any school professional who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a gender different from the student's biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid Sage's change in gender identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. To see Sage's Mom give her heartbreaking testimony, and see questions and comments from Delegates Dave LaRock, John McGuire, and others in committee, [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EWuf4mYAEEO74DR19b2qU1fclVcKG3eyioQHz8Ya08zktF7He_j8ca52laEj2XJJ1ZZ3CaRtoVSbcM2LIy_PooSh3lpW1tHj0eTA-gqKQ_xN35J6BH2vwOvOmoAmztzgklltTUFIlshOLPQCmrvECg==&c=Sp-t7E2gURMV5bxh6bT58sEhoIQxO8MpBcFTh31TSLXkSlQo4BKu_g==&ch=fybiUHY2KuKcrNTTYQoJFqbRb931qQhBwcxU3yv09D4S-ViP2ogBTw==) for testimony.

clean_body: | | | | | | | ** I NEED YOU AND ALL YOUR FRIENDS TO SIGN UP TO BE A DELEGATE FOR MAY 6 CONVENTION == | == | | | | Endorsement List == | | | | Reminder: I CANNOT ACCEPT DONATIONS UNTIL I GET OUT OF SESSION FEBRUARY 25. It would be an honor to serve you as State Senator District 10. You can access an archive of previous newsletters at the bottom of each newsletter to learn more about me, my voting record, and what I've been up to. Sign up for the newsletter via email at john@mcguireforvirginia.com Please share this newsletter with potential delegates via the following weblink: == | "I prefer dangerous freedom of a peaceful slavery." -Thomas Jefferson | | | | | | | | | | | | | 2023 Session Update Week 5 | | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th, marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates. We begin week six on Monday. Thank you, to my incredible team of staff and volunteers, for helping us to get things done every day for Virginia. == for a list of legislation on the agenda, brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia. Please keep in mind, all bills that passed the house must now pass in the Democrat controlled Senate, and then get signed into law by Governor Glenn Youngkin. | Crossover, February 7 | | Tuesday, February 7 was Crossover. "Crossover" is the midpoint of session in the General Assembly, where bills passed by the House are considered by the Senate, and bills passed by the Senate are considered by the House. 604 bills, out of 1207 bills submitted in the House, advanced to the Senate. 538 bills, out of 810 bills submitted in the Senate, advanced to the House by Feb. 7. | Success HJ 475 CTE Signing Day | | Success! My CTE bill, HJ 475, passed Senate Rules Committee! This bill designates the fourth Wednesday of April each year as "Career and Technical Education Letter of Intent Signing Day", to encourage public private partnerships with local businesses, and to celebrate those who graduate with a job or join the U.S. Military! My CTE teacher, Mac Beaton, seen here, taught me for three years in electronics, and had a huge impact on me back in the 80s. He is now director of CTE in Henrico County. | District Photos | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On weekends, I've been meeting folks all over Senate District 10 and collecting delegate forms for the May 6 convention. I hope to meet you and your friends soon. | My WRVA Interview on Reagan's Birthday | == | February 6 is President Ronald Reagan's birthday. He would be 112 years old. President Reagan inspired me to join the United States Navy SEALs, serve our country, and be a part of something bigger than myself. I had the honor of talking about President Reagan in Goochland County at the Pickel Barrel on WRVA radio with ==. One of my many favorite Reagan quotes, "If we ever forget that we are a Nation Under God, then we will be a nation gone under." == to listen to my WRVA interview. | 300 Plus Churches | | My wife and I attend our church each Sunday at 8 am and then I attend a second or third church. Anyone who has been part of one of my campaigns knows I've been doing this since 2017. Tracy and I recently attended Passion Community Church in Powhatan County. They got us fired up and ready to take on the week! | Appomattox GOP Candidate Forum SD10 | | | | | | I was at the Appomattox County GOP SD 10 Candidate Forum, where we had a wonderful time and signed up many delegates for the May 6 SD 10 Convention. We cannot thank Appomattox County GOP chair Karen Angulo, and everyone else for coming out on a busy Saturday enough. Thank you, for all you do! | "A Perfect Radio Interview" | == | Friday, I had the honor of being a guest on the John Frederick's Radio Show. Strangely, at the Appomattox Candidate Forum, my opponent, Duane Adams (3-time Democrat), approached me and said, "You sounded whiny on the radio and it was embarrassing." Clearly, I struck a nerve when the truth was pointed out on the radio. I stand by my comments. Take a listen and let me know what you think. == | Cumberland County GOP | | | | I met some wonderful patriots in Cumberland County. Thank you, Cumberland GOP Chair Glenn Mozingo, for all you do. | The Championship Trophy At Stake | | The Championship Trophy, held by the House, is up for grabs again. Monday is the House vs. the Senate charity basketball game to raise money to fight cancer. == to donate to Team Massey Cancer research. | Virginia Tech Ties | | I wore my VA Tech tie to celebrate the Virginia Tech win over UVA basketball. Great minds think alike! | == A photo of my back pack, with a baby sock that I've carrying around since 2018 to remind folks about our most vulnerable, made the news again. "Be the light." | | In this photo Delegate Rob Bell, a UVA grad, lost a bet and wore VA Tech gear on the floor. Delegate Chris Runnion said, "This is a good example of why you shouldn't vote for gambling bills." for the story. | General Assembly Visits/ Photos | | | | | | | | We had many visitors this week stop by the office to discuss their concerns. | Sage's Law Passes the House 50-48 | | ==, "Sage's Law," a bill I am chief co-patroning with Delegate Dave LaRock, just passed Full Education Committee. It requires any school professional who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a gender different from the student's biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid Sage's change in gender identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. To see Sage's Mom give her heartbreaking testimony, and see questions and comments from Delegates Dave LaRock, John McGuire, and others in committee, == for testimony. In the news: Daily Caller == The Federalist == Daily Signal == | My Anti BDS Bill Passes the House 50-48 | | Success!!! My bill to fight antisemitism in Virginia HB 1898 passed 12-9. The BDS movement is anti-Israel/Jewish people and Virginia tax payer dollars should not support this discrimination. My bill is supported by the following organizations, signed on in support. These organizations represent nearly 200,000 Jewish Virginians: -Conference of Presidents of major American Jewish organizations -Anti-Defamation League -American Jewish Committee -Jewish Federation of North America -Countering Antisemitism Movement -Stand With Us -Christians United for Israel -United Jewish Federation of Tidewater -Jewish Community Relations Council of Tidewater, Richmond, and Greater Washington -United Jewish Community of the Virginia Peninsula -Conference of Presidents of Jewish Federation -Coalition Against Antisemitism. | Jesus at the Super Bowl | | I'm watching the Super Bowl because it will include two quarterbacks that publicly praise Jesus and there will be two commercials that praise Jesus. Our country had it's 2nd National Day of prayer when Buffalo Bills Player Damar Hamlin had heart attack during a NFL game. The broadcasts when off script and started praying on National TV in front of millions of people. God is good! | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham High School. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. You and your friends cannot vote unless you complete the delegate form. Please print the PDF form here ==, fill it out, and reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804-588-2646 to turn in your form. YOU DO NOT HAVE TO PAY A FEE. Also, please consider printing out extra forms for family members and friends. You can also drop your forms off at one of our meet and greet events. | == | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Week 4 == Week 3 == Week 2 2023 == Week 1 2023 == 2022 Newsletter Links == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: We must put an end to the woke Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Patriot, this message is a bit longer than usual, so I want to thank you in advance for taking the time to hear me out.

Many of my neighbors in Miami are immigrants from countries wrecked by socialist regimes. They came to America because they saw it as a land of liberty and common sense, free from the Marxist ideologies that turned their homelands into places of oppression. But times are changing. **Today, they see the same insanity that gripped their homelands infiltrating the United States -- and being embraced by the Democrat Party.**
_Critical race theory.
Radical gender ideology.
Pro-abortion fanaticism.
Anti-religious discrimination._
Ideas that originated on the fringe of American politics and were long relegated to Ivy League faculty lounges and socialist cells are now commonplace across major institutions, from Hollywood to the legacy media to Wall Street. **Believing that the United States is an evil empire and that men can get pregnant are now the litmus test for elite status.**

In America, people are allowed to fill their heads with nonsense if they want to. **However, no one is entitled to force that nonsense on others.**

The Biden White House is one of the worst offenders. Under the leadership of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion "experts" and a president held captive by his party's extremist base, this administration is:
* Financing **racist curricula in public schools**
* Advocating the use of **untested and unapproved puberty blockers on children**
* And turning the Department of Veterans Affairs into a **post-Roe abortion factory**
* _**... And doing all this on taxpayer dollars**_

---
| | | [HELP MARCO STOP THIS!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312114:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "HELP MARCO STOP THIS!")
---
Meanwhile, instead of responding to record-low recruitment numbers or modernizing our dangerously out-of-date military in a time of increasing great power competition, **Biden 's Pentagon is wasting valuable resources on _drag queen story hours_ , _sensitivity training_ , and countless other _woke priorities._**

This is simply unacceptable, a radical imposition on millions of Americans who see abortion as the killing of an innocent human being, who think kids should be safe from dangerous drugs and sexualized pageantry, and who rely on our military to defend them from foreign threats, not engage in social engineering. **The government and woke institutions are colluding against common sense, and our communities and children are suffering as a result.**
**This brings me to my main point: I am leading the fight in the U.S. Senate to protect America against radical woke activism in all its forms.**
**_[If you support my fight to stop woke ideology from infiltrating every aspect of our lives, I humbly ask that you consider making a donation of any amount.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312115:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "If you support my fight to stop woke ideology from infiltrating every aspect of our lives, I
humbly ask that you consider making a donation of any amount.")_ Every single dollar we raise goes towards our efforts to restore the American Dream and take back our country from the radical Left. **
---
| | | [DONATE TO HELP MARCO STOP WOKEISM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312115:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "DONATE
TO HELP MARCO STOP WOKEISM")
---
If we become a country where left-wing protestors are exempt from the law, Wall Street wields investors' dollars as a weapon against conservatives, and the U.S. government undermines the national interest, we won't last long. **Common-sense policymakers have a duty to hold elites accountable and prevent wokeness from turning the land of the free into another socialist wasteland.**

If you've made it this far, thank you so much for reading this in its entirety. I truly appreciate your support.

Thank you,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312115:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r)
---
Senator Marco Rubio
---
| | | [STOP WOKEISM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312114:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "STOP WOKEISM")
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312116:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "My parents lost their country. I'm not
going to let us lose ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312116:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312116:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312117:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the
filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312117:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE LEFT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312117:JckC4DGNj:m:1:3299561967:6CCDA3F148BB03235579C1EF812C6B5E:r "STOP THE DEMS")

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Let us know your top priorities for 2023
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
You’re invited to take our quick survey » Peter,

As the 2023 Kentucky gubernatorial race heats up and Andy continues working and delivering for Kentuckians, **Andy wants to hear directly from YOU!**

Surveys like these are essential for Andy and our team to know which issues are most pressing for you and your family. The responses you share will provide helpful insight.

[**Will you take our short survey right now and share your priorities with Andy for 2023?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58627315/391710862/-1680506800?ms=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&refcode=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&source=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=/ywTtoQSdgUQy0XI2hDZiUh/jyqxc6U80vlrySNUJe8XzYxRyJUZsZzjSYu64KtVtSqxZ641JSxI4h7+8J1ZGOcihFnmZpN+CJLkcCPIWMHroiGgnnBKr7vMto7JvGcFRf1GmYYYuEm+bmYHSc/N2pa+cRVx+zXwwFNLD86LOTvL5d9QFqIu6JvUUDNQa6Oq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhkZjYwZC1mZmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7QGfOq2NnT7fcdMxwkecHtCZVVJmuXJY1NLdJohqQE=&emci=6ae2b6f7-84a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=678df60d-ffaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1437603) | 2023 Priorities Survey Infrastructure improvements Economic growth Public education Small business growth Lower health care costs Inflation reduction Reducing crime Other [SUBMIT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58627319/391710863/-1680506800?ms=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&refcode=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&source=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230212_survey_esrv_gq_act_pri_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=/ywTtoQSdgUQy0XI2hDZiUh/jyqxc6U80vlrySNUJe8XzYxRyJUZsZzjSYu64KtVtSqxZ641JSxI4h7+8J1ZGOcihFnmZpN+CJLkcCPIWMHroiGgnnBKr7vMto7JvGcFRf1GmYYYuEm+bmYHSc/N2pa+cRVx+zXwwFNLD86LOTvL5d9QFqIu6JvUUDNQa6Oq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhkZjYwZC1mZmFhLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7QGfOq2NnT7fcdMxwkecHtCZVVJmuXJY1NLdJohqQE=&emci=6ae2b6f7-84a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=678df60d-ffaa-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1437603)
---

Andy remains steadfast in his commitment to growing our Commonwealth’s economy, providing good-paying and secure jobs, improving public education, and protecting the progress he's made over the last three years.

#

**_— The New York Times_** **“The Democrats’ Senate Map of Doom”**
**_— The Bulwark_** **“Tammy Baldwin’s Third Term? Why Democrats May Have a More Difficult Time in 2024”**
**_— Milwaukee Independent_** After Republicans won Wisconsin’s Senate race last year by just _one point,_ all eyes are on Tammy’s race in 2024. Team, President Obama warned that **“the gains we’ve made in this redistricting cycle are fragile.”** Now, we’re seeing the challenges he anticipated play out in North Carolina.

**FIRST:** Last year, our affiliate helped secure a monumental victory for voting rights and fair maps at the North Carolina Supreme Court.

**BUT THEN:** Control of the North Carolina Supreme Court flipped.

**SO NOW:** In what one local outlet called a “radical departure” from precedent, North Carolina’s Supreme Court has agreed to _rehear the case Republicans lost!_

**LET US BE PERFECTLY CLEAR:** Nothing in state law has changed, and no facts in the case have changed.
**_The only difference is that the lawmakers trying to gerrymander and suppress voting rights now get another chance before North Carolina’s Supreme Court._

[_Republicans have shown they’re willing to do whatever it takes to continue manipulating maps and undermining voting rights, even if it means subverting our system of checks and balances. Will you rush a donation now to help the NDRC fight back against these anti-democratic tactics across the country?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58635754/391717348/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230212_FR_2K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlYzRiOTcyLTA3YWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Udh0OV7E4N3uEHONLVOXRZ3cgMZSEiNhXHs_ckYrV34=)**

Attorney General Eric Holder did not mince words. He said: **“This is not a function of legal principle – it is an indication of political opportunism.”** He’s absolutely right.

And we’re afraid this is only the beginning.

Ahead of last November’s election, the fair maps movement helped secure what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” **But if Republicans can continue stacking state courts in states across the country, the gains we’ve made could be rolled back _before the next election!_

[_The NDRC is committed to fighting these extremist efforts across the country, but the strength of our work is determined by grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: President Obama’s warning is coming to fruition. | | = = Team, President Obama warned that “the gains we’ve made in this redistricting cycle are fragile.” Now, we’re seeing the challenges he anticipated play out in North Carolina. FIRST: Last year, our affiliate helped secure a monumental victory for voting rights and fair maps at the North Carolina Supreme Court. BUT THEN: Control of the North Carolina Supreme Court flipped. SO NOW: In what one local outlet called a “radical departure” from precedent, North Carolina’s Supreme Court has agreed to rehear the case Republicans lost! LET US BE PERFECTLY CLEAR: Nothing in state law has changed, and no facts in the case have changed. The only difference is that the lawmakers trying to gerrymander and suppress voting rights now get another chance before North Carolina’s Supreme Court. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Attorney General Eric Holder did not mince words. He said: “This is not a function of legal principle – it is an indication of political opportunism.” He’s absolutely right. And we’re afraid this is only the beginning. Ahead of last November’s election, the fair maps movement helped secure what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” But if Republicans can continue stacking state courts in states across the country, the gains we’ve made could be rolled back before the next election! = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

| | **BREAKING: Congressional Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Renew Push for Statehood**
---
The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to KILL the bill!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20230212_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6358%2E878179%2ET20_u4)

Listen, not only would DC Statehood give hundreds of thousands of people much-needed representation in Congress, _it could SAVE our slim Senate majority!_

Republicans are TERRIFIED — so they’re launching vicious attacks to shut down any chance we have of making DC Statehood a reality.

body:

| [ Fetterman Remains Hospitalized, Hears Voices ‘Like The Teacher In Peanuts’ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659713%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cSmqTBVO9G2asfVWwN%2fYFQ&sysid=1)
---
[ First-term Sen. John Fetterman remains in a Washington D.C. hospital, and complains of hearing the voice of the teacher from the “Peanuts” cartoon when listening to people speak. name: Dan Goldman
subject: A circus show, the State of the Union, and bagels.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
This week, we saw just how stark the contrast is between Democrats and Republicans in Washington. |
#
---
Peter, My work in Congress to preserve the rule of law and our democratic institutions from extremist, MAGA Republicans and to deliver for New Yorkers has been going full steam ahead on parallel tracks. In this week’s detailed update, I want to tell you about three events this week that show exactly what we are up against in Washington — and what grave danger our democracy is in today.

* * *

On Tuesday night, I had the privilege of attending President Biden’s State of the Union Address. I arrived wearing my “warming stripes” pin from the Climate Action Campaign to show the urgency with which we must address the climate crisis. I was proud to hear the President lay out his agenda to continue to build on his accomplishments in order to create an economy that will help every American realize the American dream. He made it crystal clear that when given the chance, Democrats deliver. Meanwhile, Republicans showed their disrespect for our democracy by heckling and booing the President of the United States, shouting over him and calling him a “liar.” The contrast could not have been more apparent: Democrats are fighting hard for our families and our democracy, and they’re fighting for Donald Trump and airtime on Fox News.

* * *

The next day, the Republicans held a much-ballyhooed hearing about Twitter’s suspension of a highly suspicious and false report in the _New York Post_ connecting Hunter Biden to the removal of a corrupt prosecutor in Ukraine. Four former employees of Twitter testified and provided no support for Republicans’ inflammatory claims that the FBI censored free speech. Chairman James Comer went so far to assert that President Biden lied about Ukraine. I was able to use my deep understanding of the bogus Republican claims about Ukraine derived from leading the Ukraine impeachment investigation, and I used my questioning time to clarify that the entire premise of the Republicans’ allegations is false. I will continue to push back against baseless allegations made by the MAGA extremists on the Oversight Committee.

* * *

On Thursday, the “Select Subcommittee to Investigate the Weaponization of the Federal Government” — or what I call the Subcommittee to Obstruct Justice — held its first hearing. It was, as Nicole Wallace described it on _MSNBC_ on Friday: “Chutzpah on top of audacity on top of delusion.” Republicans began with dramatic opening statements from Senators Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and Ron Johnson (R-WI) — in which they rattled off a litany of unhinged, imagined grievances about Hillary Clinton’s emails, Hunter Biden’s alleged conflicts of interests, and conspiracies about Dr. Anthony Fauci. In contrast, Democrats invited Rep. Jamie Raskin to make an opening statement, and it was masterful. He explained how the Subcommittee itself is weaponizing the federal government for political purposes, and how Rep. Jim Jordan, who himself chairs the subcommittee, openly told a CPAC audience this past August that the subcommittee’s investigations will create bogus narratives that “help frame up the 2024 race when I hope ... President Trump will run again — and we need to make sure that he wins.” During the hearing, I asked Jim Jordan when he planned to provide to the Democrats any transcripts or notes of secret meetings that Republicans have had with “dozens” of “whistleblowers” so we can simply review what they said. He refused to commit to that basic level of fairness. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636360/391720305/-816099113?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2I5ODhhMC0wYmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKfNr65b8LjnphA0rSqxnkGPqfFt1cwLagRqjWcjP4I=&emci=94e33010-02ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a3b988a0-0bab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823) Not surprisingly, the Republicans’ first witnesses called to “testify” about the “weaponization” of the federal government included a law professor whose only work for the federal government was as an intern decades ago and a former FBI special agent who retired from the FBI in 1999 before smartphones even existed. As a federal prosecutor for a decade, I know that the only “weaponization” of the federal government occurred under Donald Trump’s presidency, and you can be sure that we Democrats will provide evidence about that misconduct as this Subcommittee proceeds. Peter — what we heard in these two hearings is just a preview of what’s to come from House Republicans this Congress. They have conclusions in search of evidence, but thus far, they have put forth no facts or evidence to support their partisan conclusions. I will not stop exposing their investigations for the overreaching, baseless, partisan propaganda that they are. **But I need your help. Your online support allows me to spend more time preparing for these hearings and thus more effectively standing up against the Republicans and for our democracy. Please chip in what you can to show you’re with me in pushing back against these sham investigations.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636361/391720306/-1453822927?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2I5ODhhMC0wYmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKfNr65b8LjnphA0rSqxnkGPqfFt1cwLagRqjWcjP4I=)

---

* * *
Our hearings and the State of the Union certainly made headlines, but here are some less publicized updates about our work that you may have missed:
* **I toured the Humanitarian Emergency Response and Relief Center in Red Hook, Brooklyn** to ensure that migrants cruelly bused in by Republican Governors like Ron DeSantis and Greg Abbott were receiving adequate care. It’s clear that the City is working hard to meet the moment, and we must continue to welcome migrants with open arms. But my visit emphasized the continued need to fight for comprehensive immigration reform to ensure that anyone coming to our shores seeking a better life can do so, just as my family did.

* **I cosponsored 3 bipartisan bills to curb the gun violence epidemic** that is claiming too many lives in our country.

* **I joined President Biden in Hudson Yards to promote the benefits of the _Inflation Reduction Act_** , which makes historic investments in our city’s crumbling roads, bridges, and transportation systems to create good-paying jobs and tackle climate change.

* I joined my colleagues in a **resolution to expel George Santos** from the House of Representatives.

* And I teamed up with Rep. Grace Meng to call on the FCC to **expand language access for Wireless Emergency Alerts** , which currently only serve English and Spanish speakers — leaving countless immigrant communities, including in NY-10’s Manhattan and Sunset Park Chinatowns — without critical information to protect themselves in disasters.

_Like I said, full steam ahead._

* * *

One last thing to end your weekend on a brighter note.
It came to my office’s attention very quickly that too many of my colleagues did not know what _real_ New York bagels and schmear are. So as a representative of the greatest city in the world, and indeed, the home of the best bagels and schmear in the world, I invited my Democratic colleagues to the inaugural meeting of the **Bagel Caucus.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636367/391720312/681192171?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2I5ODhhMC0wYmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKfNr65b8LjnphA0rSqxnkGPqfFt1cwLagRqjWcjP4I=&emci=94e33010-02ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a3b988a0-0bab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)
My staff drove down dozens of bagels to Washington straight from [fantastic local businesses](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636368/391720313/319915505?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2I5ODhhMC0wYmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKfNr65b8LjnphA0rSqxnkGPqfFt1cwLagRqjWcjP4I=&emci=94e33010-02ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a3b988a0-0bab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823) in my district. And the reception was fantastic. Hundreds of my colleagues and their staffers were able to experience a taste of New York, and I even managed to convince my friend Rep. Maxwell Alejandro Frost to appreciate a good toasted bagel (he was firmly pro-steamed bagel before this).
It was wonderful to spread the bagel love to our friends from around the country — and to bring some much-needed warmth and joy to Washington despite the many challenges facing our democracy today.
**Peter, I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. This grassroots team helps me hold MAGA Republicans accountable, deliver for families in New York and across the country, and this week, remind my friends in Washington that New York bagels are the best in the world. If you’re able, please add a donation of any amount below to help me stay the course.**

I was proud to hear the President lay out his agenda to continue to build on his accomplishments in order to create an economy that will help every American realize the American dream. He made it crystal clear that when given the chance, Democrats deliver. Meanwhile, Republicans showed their disrespect for our democracy by heckling and booing the President of the United States, shouting over him and calling him a “liar.” The contrast could not have been more apparent: Democrats are fighting hard for our families and our democracy, and they’re fighting for Donald Trump and airtime on Fox News. The next day, the Republicans held a much-ballyhooed hearing about Twitter’s suspension of a highly suspicious and false report in the New York Post connecting Hunter Biden to the removal of a corrupt prosecutor in Ukraine. Four former employees of Twitter testified and provided no support for Republicans’ inflammatory claims that the FBI censored free speech. Chairman James Comer went so far to assert that President Biden lied about Ukraine. I was able to use my deep understanding of the bogus Republican claims about Ukraine derived from leading the Ukraine impeachment investigation, and I used my questioning time to clarify that the entire premise of the Republicans’ allegations is false. I will continue to push back against baseless allegations made by the MAGA extremists on the Oversight Committee. On Thursday, the “Select Subcommittee to Investigate the Weaponization of the Federal Government” — or what I call the Subcommittee to Obstruct Justice — held its first hearing. It was, as Nicole Wallace described it on MSNBC on Friday: “Chutzpah on top of audacity on top of delusion.” Republicans began with dramatic opening statements from Senators Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and Ron Johnson (R-WI) — in which they rattled off a litany of unhinged, imagined grievances about Hillary Clinton’s emails, Hunter Biden’s alleged conflicts of interests, and conspiracies about Dr. Anthony Fauci. In contrast, Democrats invited Rep. Jamie Raskin to make an opening statement, and it was masterful. He explained how the Subcommittee itself is weaponizing the federal government for political purposes, and how Rep. Jim Jordan, who himself chairs the subcommittee, openly told a CPAC audience this past August that the subcommittee’s investigations will create bogus narratives that “help frame up the 2024 race when I hope ... President Trump will run again — and we need to make sure that he wins.” During the hearing, I asked Jim Jordan when he planned to provide to the Democrats any transcripts or notes of secret meetings that Republicans have had with “dozens” of “whistleblowers” so we can simply review what they said. He refused to commit to that basic level of fairness. Not surprisingly, the Republicans’ first witnesses called to “testify” about the “weaponization” of the federal government included a law professor whose only work for the federal government was as an intern decades ago and a former FBI special agent who retired from the FBI in 1999 before smartphones even existed. As a federal prosecutor for a decade, I know that the only “weaponization” of the federal government occurred under Donald Trump’s presidency, and you can be sure that we Democrats will provide evidence about that misconduct as this Subcommittee proceeds. Peter — what we heard in these two hearings is just a preview of what’s to come from House Republicans this Congress. They have conclusions in search of evidence, but thus far, they have put forth no facts or evidence to support their partisan conclusions. I will not stop exposing their investigations for the overreaching, baseless, partisan propaganda that they are. But I need your help. Your online support allows me to spend more time preparing for these hearings and thus more effectively standing up against the Republicans and for our democracy. Please chip in what you can to show you’re with me in pushing back against these sham investigations. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Our hearings and the State of the Union certainly made headlines, but here are some less publicized updates about our work that you may have missed: I toured the Humanitarian Emergency Response and Relief Center in Red Hook, Brooklyn to ensure that migrants cruelly bused in by Republican Governors like Ron DeSantis and Greg Abbott were receiving adequate care. It’s clear that the City is working hard to meet the moment, and we must continue to welcome migrants with open arms. But my visit emphasized the continued need to fight for comprehensive immigration reform to ensure that anyone coming to our shores seeking a better life can do so, just as my family did. I cosponsored 3 bipartisan bills to curb the gun violence epidemic that is claiming too many lives in our country. I joined President Biden in Hudson Yards to promote the benefits of the Inflation Reduction Act , which makes historic investments in our city’s crumbling roads, bridges, and transportation systems to create good-paying jobs and tackle climate change. I joined my colleagues in a resolution to expel George Santos from the House of Representatives. And I teamed up with Rep. Grace Meng to call on the FCC to expand language access for Wireless Emergency Alerts , which currently only serve English and Spanish speakers — leaving countless immigrant communities, including in NY-10’s Manhattan and Sunset Park Chinatowns — without critical information to protect themselves in disasters. Like I said, full steam ahead. One last thing to end your weekend on a brighter note. It came to my office’s attention very quickly that too many of my colleagues did not know what real New York bagels and schmear are. So as a representative of the greatest city in the world, and indeed, the home of the best bagels and schmear in the world, I invited my Democratic colleagues to the inaugural meeting of the Bagel Caucus. My staff drove down dozens of bagels to Washington straight from in my district. And the reception was fantastic. Hundreds of my colleagues and their staffers were able to experience a taste of New York, and I even managed to convince my friend Rep. Maxwell Alejandro Frost to appreciate a good toasted bagel (he was firmly pro-steamed bagel before this). It was wonderful to spread the bagel love to our friends from around the country — and to bring some much-needed warmth and joy to Washington despite the many challenges facing our democracy today. Peter, I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. This grassroots team helps me hold MAGA Republicans accountable, deliver for families in New York and across the country, and this week, remind my friends in Washington that New York bagels are the best in the world. If you’re able, please add a donation of any amount below to help me stay the course. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Yours in this fight, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: This is not the way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
