---

**All the hard work I put into securing our border ... Joe Biden ruined it.**

I spent more time working on securing our southern border than any other Secretary of State or CIA Director in history because I knew that a nation without secure borders is no nation at all.

**Joe Biden, on the other hand, has tried to ignore the crisis his policies have created at the southern border. Worse of all: in Joe Biden 's America, every state is a border state. This isn't just a problem for a few towns along the border anymore.**

Putting Americans first starts with ensuring security and regulating the flow of people across the border, something the Biden Administration is too naive to understand.

The Democrats are just sitting back and allowing swarms of thousands upon thousands of illegal immigrants, terrorists, and drug traffickers to flow freely into the U.S. _**[That's why I need your help to support America First conservatives who won't just sit back and watch, but will get their hands dirty and secure our border!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312130:JJGK5DGuN:m:1:3299561967:BD174C273A83057D8A28B953B3A894EA:r "That’s why I need your help to support America First conservatives who won’t just sit
back and watch, but will get their hands dirty and secure our border!")**_

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312130:JJGK5DGuN:m:1:3299561967:BD174C273A83057D8A28B953B3A894EA:r)
---

Now, border crossings are at an all-time high. Over _**3X higher**_ than what they were under the Trump Administration. _**UNBELIEVABLE**_.

That's why I am working day and night to bring back the America first policies I helped implement when Republicans were in power. Whether it was our Remain in Mexico policy or building the border wall, we took decisive action to secure our borders and protect our nation.

Now, I need YOUR help to make sure we return to those tough border policies that worked so well. Are you able to make a donation today to our _**[Border Security Fund](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312130:JJGK5DGuN:m:1:3299561967:BD174C273A83057D8A28B953B3A894EA:r "Border Security
Fund")**_ , to help us support more law and order conservative candidates all over the country who will never waver in the mission to keep the American people safe?

---

It's critical we put an end to this madness before Joe Biden completely destroys our country.

Never Give An Inch,

| **A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**

Our God-given freedoms are under assault. That's why I created the Freedom Fund. To defend the freedoms and values that make America great against government overreach and the radical Left.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312131:JJGK5DGuN:m:1:3299561967:BD174C273A83057D8A28B953B3A894EA:r "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In nine days, Wisconsin could become a red state for a very long time, if these Supreme Court candidates don’t win the primary for the open seat on the State Supreme Court. This could affect abortion rights across the country, and possibly how the state’s electoral votes count in the 2024 presidential race. A lot is hanging on this Feb. 21st primary.
body:
Swing state to red state
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b786e28-2549-4dcf-8630-3baf1cbd0be1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In nine days Wisconsin could become a red state for the foreseeable future._ **_On February 21st, there's a first round of elections for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat_ _\--a top two primary_ _._ [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5884e29-b27e-4314-b15f-e37904fdfb37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From our friends at Pod Save America:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c33acb6-add2-4b49-a85e-5e2a84726706/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To recap from a previous email we sent: **_With a right winger leaving Wisconsin's Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat. There'__s an open primary Feb. 21st __with two Democrats and two Republicans_ _. If Dems run first and second, we guarantee a win in April's general election. At the very least, we must stop both Republicans from winning the 21st, shutting us out of the general election._** _Meanwhile, The Wisconsin Democratic Party just shared:_ We just got word MAGA Republican-aligned candidate Jennifer Dorow just placed a $60,000 ad buy.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6280ed87-54c2-42a0-96e4-05adbae53b81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_A liberal Supreme Court majority will overturn Wisconsin's radical abortion ban and insane gerrymandering that delivered Kevin McCarthy a House majority. It'll President Biden in 2024 from what Republicans tried in '20 and promised to do again--use state legislatures and courts to steal the election._** [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28bb11c3-bbf4-4351-ba04-6184ada3bdf4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America! Cliff

|

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teeebf03f-7a27-4af7-a87c-8daca030c597/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter Willis,

As workers unionize to demand fair pay and
better conditions, Starbucks has fought back ferociously with illegal
union busting tactics, including withholding an increase of $200 million
in salary and benefits that nonunion stores received from hundreds of
unionizing stores across America.

If that’s not bad enough, they’ve also closed unionized stores and hired
union busters who previously worked for the infamous Pinkerton Detective
Agency.

That’s why our founder, Bernie Sanders, is demanding that Starbucks CEO
Howard Schultz testify before his committee.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] [ ]STAND WITH BERNIE Peter Willis, As workers unionize to demand fair pay and better conditions, Starbucks has fought back ferociously with illegal union busting tactics, including withholding an increase of $200 million in salary and benefits that nonunion stores received from hundreds of unionizing stores across America. That’s why our founder, Bernie Sanders, is demanding that Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz testify before his committee. | **February Field Organizing Fund**

Goal: $5,000 [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58636867/391723393/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230212MM_MM_HQ_FULL_10_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDc4NmFkMS0wZmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVVdzd57D1LyU8HYjMbTvlC0_FHmAEiPO-0qUh1S5rM=)

Friend, the 2022 election was Jennifer's closest race yet. She won by less than 7 percent in a district that, just a year before, Glenn Youngkin came 2 percent short of carrying.

**The data is clear: VA-10 is a prime battleground district. And we're making sure to get a head start this cycle by ramping up our operations as fast as possible.**

We're launching a February Field Organizing Fund to fuel our early volunteer recruitment and voter contact efforts around the district — because it's never too early to engage folks.

| Peter,

| Why am I one of the few members of Congress who the Swamp can't control?
Simple - because I don't take a DIME of the Swamp's dirty money!!!
I believe I'm the only Republican in Washington with such a policy, Peter, and it makes me solely beholden to my ONE special interest group: [THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IxVuob4qO8opTmLSbxZKF73BAxJZgmaOtEtEUx8Cgj0gD4oZmewcQNZSStewD2tdIUiXtJUJl6pd1r3SlqTJeZ6tT4iQAvUCcpgM1Wc3iQ4of7E7gdb23M3Lz8NeFjWPxgp8yR66JFrWgI6i05jpqU746vYQUdaiuv21QRWNNhyNhCgeP9m-Kwt_L3dEzW-XwCKGFZcXl4R2rvEYmmveYwgfOoWRb2Ga&c=0WME6vlQjprh-gLQqupvwMaWqAvk2x361cLr-Sxk6wt-MkZKyKb4Ag==&ch=4Tetqu4egvdTHrmEdY74C-JYZs_13jMJUsJbJIrWigaTVNfp5ZU9Yg==)
So I'm not afraid that the political elite will come after me over my strong stand during the Speaker vote to Drain the Swamp. I've overcome attacks from the corrupt uniparty Establishment before.
Because at the end of the day Peter, I have ONE THING that can beat the powers-that-be in Washington:
Grassroots supporters like YOU who have helped create the most POWERFUL political movement in America!

I’ve got my Super Bowl snacks — cheesesteaks, soft pretzels, and water ice — and I can't wait to cheer on our team and our Commonwealth. It's always amazing to see what we can accomplish together.

So no matter who wins tonight (the Eagles), I'll be celebrating what happened on and off the field over the last 12 months.

And tomorrow, I'll get right back to work for you.

Go Birds,

Bob

With only two seats standing between Washington Republicans and control of the Senate, the stakes are really high. I want to return to the Senate so I can continue putting working people front and center of every piece of legislation, every policy decision -- from burying the term “rust belt” and creating more good-paying jobs in people’s hometowns to protecting workers’ right to join a union so they can bargain for better wages, benefits, and conditions. On the flipside, Mitch McConnell and Republicans are talking about slashing Social Security and Medicare, raising taxes on working-class Americans, and passing a nationwide abortion ban. name: Sharice
subject: I know who I’m rooting for today…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey there,

You know that I work hard in Congress to make life better for working families in Kansas and across the country. I’m always happy to come together with my Democratic colleagues and anyone else who puts people over partisan bickering in order to move our country forward.

**But when it comes to repping my hometown football team — all bets are off.**

I’ve already put odds on Kansas City running it back and taking home the Lombardi Trophy today, but I want to know who you’re rooting for.

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Does this look right?
body:
At the DLCC, we wholeheartedly believe in the power of long-term investments. | | |
---
| | At the DLCC, we wholeheartedly believe in the power of early money – in fact, it’s how we were able to help state Democrats have their best midterm election year since _1934_ this past fall. Thanks to the help of our grassroots supporters, we were able to make long-term investments in data, boots on the ground, and media spends long before Election Day – and it paid off. When you become an official 2023 DLCC member, we send you a card in the mail – and that membership card is more than just a piece of paper. It’s a tangible, commitment to electing state Democrats. It’s a symbol that you’re in this fight with us – that you’re ready to invest in electing Democrats who will fight for abortion access, fair wages, climate reform, and so much more. **That’s why we were really disappointed when we didn’t see your name on our updated 2023 DLCC membership list. Can you take a peek?** | **2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD**

Republicans have _dominated_ us at the state-level for over a decade thanks to their seemingly endless cashflow into state legislatures. In that time, they built up a war chest and they’re ready to spend it all to continue GOP dominance at the state level.
Here’s the truth: We can only overcome Republicans’ systematic advantage in state legislatures if every Democrat reading this unites together. We don’t have a huge war chest or MAGA millions – we just have grassroots supporters like you powering this movement.
[8,877 Democrats across the country have already activated their 2023 DLCC membership. Can you chip in $10 or more right now to activate yours and join them? clean_body: At the DLCC, we wholeheartedly believe in the power of long-term investments. | | | | | At the DLCC, we wholeheartedly believe in the power of early money – in fact, it’s how we were able to help state Democrats have their best midterm election year since 1934 this past fall. Thanks to the help of our grassroots supporters, we were able to make long-term investments in data, boots on the ground, and media spends long before Election Day – and it paid off. When you become an official 2023 DLCC member, we send you a card in the mail – and that membership card is more than just a piece of paper. It’s a tangible, commitment to electing state Democrats. It’s a symbol that you’re in this fight with us – that you’re ready to invest in electing Democrats who will fight for abortion access, fair wages, climate reform, and so much more. That’s why we were really disappointed when we didn’t see your name on our updated 2023 DLCC membership list. Can you take a peek? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: ** PENDING Suggested Gift: $10 If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans have dominated us at the state-level for over a decade thanks to their seemingly endless cashflow into state legislatures. In that time, they built up a war chest and they’re ready to spend it all to continue GOP dominance at the state level. Here’s the truth: We can only overcome Republicans’ systematic advantage in state legislatures if every Democrat reading this unites together. We don’t have a huge war chest or MAGA millions – we just have grassroots supporters like you powering this movement. Thank you! name: DNC HQ
subject: Celebrating the contributions of Black Americans past and present
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
As we reflect on the contributions of Black Americans, we hope you’ll join us in recommitting ourselves to combating injustice at its source, ensuring everyone has a seat at the table and standing up for what is right. | |
---
Throughout Black History Month and all year long, Democrats celebrate the contributions of Black Americans past and present. Both our party and our nation have come so far standing on the shoulders of giants like Fannie Lou Hamer, Jesse Jackson, and Shirley Chisholm who paved the way for so many. **This month, we champion members of our party who have made history in the last election, like Wes Moore, the first Black governor of Maryland; Summer Lee, the first Black congresswoman from Pennsylvania; House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, the first Black lawmaker to lead a party in Congress; the list goes on.** We honor these firsts, and so many others at the state, federal, and municipal levels who reflect the diversity of our nation. It is because of your commitment to electing Democrats up and down the ballot in every ZIP code that we continue to celebrate the wins and progress Democrats have made. **To further your advocacy on behalf of issues that represent diverse communities and Democratic values, we would love for you to join the DNC Coalitions Team.**
[**GET INVOLVED**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQjEHCPDqPWPikrQBgOODAjbV-t-lwUfT7AG7yBoOL200EjI5DM1v-U8k5sXPpzur0Nnhat3YnC_JAS44bk9_edt9_eI2DCyRbzGkbQV_cmHZyzid6IN5zHu9YcioHVHY88RkbouOxnZu8xYxVnR0tYbj6T4mrk17UEPkO15Gq_Tyyvy0rMwY5ldSO1HabZ_xSSHNUojkkMse3u5FjnPva0TI9RH0TG8W597HOQYl60206gD3rNJurnjZLJwzxrHdV61AoaAt2mtxl4F3X_FHJBT-QXTJmcjxjdBtgZ-aOpsAxE5pPFsBpsZfJFBqHszJeKoVmPSatZdbFcHmLVWh2AtcbBNl4U9kZad00J4gl9-nPsBzGPkAHKnZZjNP3VYD-fAov0g0O3216OZEHJoWzWVGfMCUMIrljd4vsJLpkJlwF-BFF-0otMqQUIqpuU59YAeUVDUVTA0gNhyQZKgVsKg/3tn/7EJJ_tJiRbS9s8Qova2-rg/h0/pIopFKbxLcmzpAufQYU739GPcK16knv5SMuji2tDV7k)

_**Let me be clear: I don’t know a SINGLE Republican who wants to cut Social Security OR Medicare. **_

_But meanwhile, Joe Biden has a history of proposing cuts to BOTH._
And just last year, the radical Left CUT Medicare - and the woke media is REFUSING to cover it.

**This is aimed at dealing with ALL the crazy new laws our Congress is passing as of late. **

body:
#
Peter, we wanted to check in.
Pramila is spending every day fighting Republicans to protect our social safety nets, defend reproductive rights, advocate for immigrants, and advance our bold progressive agenda. In the meantime, we’ve been reviewing our finances.
**We searched your record and this is what we found on file for you:**
**Peter's 2023 Supporter Record**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2023 Donor?:** No — not yet!**
****2023 Total:** $0
**Suggested donation: $27**

_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
**[Contribute $27 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34826?refcode=em20230212-2163&t=20&akid=2163%2E420207%2EWhCrMv)**
Now that we’re almost halfway through the first financial quarter of 2023, it’s our job to make sure we’re on track to meet our fundraising goals so Pramila stays strong. **Our grassroots movement always comes through for Pramila, and we know this time will be no different.**
Donations from emails like these keep our operations running, prepare us for busier times ahead on the campaign trail, and allow us to invest in organizing work year-round. That’s why we’re coming to our most engaged supporters first -- **that means you, Peter!**

Thanks for your support today,
-- Jayapal HQ

name: Young Kim (R-CA)
subject: Have I ever shared these photos with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)
---

---
Hey Patriot, it's Congesswoman Young Kim.

I hope you're having a great start to your week. I know this message is a bit longer than what I normally share with you, but I wanted to share my story so you could get to know me a little better.

I was not born in America, but I am most certainly proud to be an American. I was born in and spent the first thirteen years of my life in South Korea before later moving to Guam and then on to Hawaii.

When I first moved to America, my mother and I would collect cans and bottles on the beach and then donate the funds raised to our church -- our way of giving back to the community that had welcomed us with open arms. Below is a picture of me spending precious time with my mother and family.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)
---

I am especially thankful to have been raised by such a strong, spirited woman. She made it possible for me to achieve the American Dream and taught me the importance of giving back to our community. My mom was truly one of a kind.

I also would not have become the woman I am today without my father. My dad was the perfect example of generosity, strength, and kindness. I am forever grateful to be his daughter and I miss him every day.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)
---

I spent years navigating our immigration process and was granted citizenship. I put myself through college, started a business, raised a family of four children, and now am one of the first Korean American women in Congress. I have always put our community first, and will continue to do so in Washington.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)
---

When I was first elected in 2020, we faced an uphill battle and won together. Thanks to members of our team like you, I became the first Republican to unseat an incumbent California Democrat in 26 years - and to this day, we're still not in the clear.

In just two years in the People's House, Democrats have spent millions against us, breaking the bank against us at every turn. And as we head into a presidential election cycle, Democrats are wasting no time and are already on the campaign trail in Southern California to flip seats like mine. They are determined to flip every vulnerable seat they can, _including this one._

**[Can you chip in to protect this seat?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r "Can you chip in
to defend this seat?")** If you've ever wanted to have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our nation, you can't afford to sit this one out.

Democrats are just 5 seats away from taking the House. Chuck Schumer has the Senate. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have the White House. Protecting the House for Republicans is the only way to put lower inflation, secure borders, and quick, common-sense reforms at the top of the agenda!

My friend, this is bigger than one seat. It's about saving the future of our country. Can I count on you to help to defend this seat from the Democrats?

---
| | [★ SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY ★](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r "DEFEND YOUNG’S SEAT")
---

To victory,

Young Kim (R-CA)

_P.S.- Here 's another good one of me with my family that I just had to share with you!_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312146:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)
---

* * *
---
_We 'll get straight to the point.

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we're humbly asking for any amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. <](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312147:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r "So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. <")**_
---

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312148:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)**[DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62312147:JOOX5DGNN:m:1:3299561967:A18C262CFD55A6A50856EDDFE53B44B1:r)**
---

|

Anaheim, CA 92817

subject: Congrats Hakeem Jeffries!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
From: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| **BREAKING: Hakeem Jeffries makes history as the first Black lawmaker to lead a party in Congress** Listen, this is a HUGE milestone for Jeffries, Democrats, and the entire country. So we’re sending Jeffries a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM Monday – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40203?t=6&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40203?t=7&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40203?t=8&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40203?t=9&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40203?t=10&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40203?t=11&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6363%2E878179%2EbwMGnw).**

name: MTG Alert
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s disgraceful week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58639354/391733643/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2YzZDdjNS0yNGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZQqvFIq6ReCmvyKgf9KjN8dowJzGPdLCeNYqaRrtUg=&emci=a95f628e-8ea8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=dcf3d7c5-24ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | This week, Marjorie Taylor Greene reminded us all why she’s one of the biggest disgraces in Congress.

**__FIRST:__** Let’s talk about her committee “work.” After being placed on some of the most powerful and important congressional committees, she proceeded to spread racist conspiracy theories and divisive hatred. She was even handed **_*the GAVEL*_** to preside over Congress! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58639355/391733644/710125701?refcode=20230212.2_MTG_2U&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2YzZDdjNS0yNGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZQqvFIq6ReCmvyKgf9KjN8dowJzGPdLCeNYqaRrtUg=)
---
**__THEN:__** She paraded around the Capitol with a ridiculous, huge “spy” balloon, and then booed, jeered, and interrupted President Biden’s State of the Union speech, acting like a spoiled toddler in front of the nation.

**__NOW:__** She’s far from done, and has nearly two more years of a GOP House Majority to humiliate herself, her office, and our state in front of the country. And with her position on some of the most powerful congressional committees, she’s going to spend her time working to roll back the progress that Democrats have fought for since President Biden took office.

**_[We need to retake the House and re-elect President Biden in 2024 so we can remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from some of the most important committees in Congress. There’s no telling what kind of damage she’ll do in the next two years. Please, rush a donation now to help us fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58639356/391733645/710125701?refcode=20230212.2_MTG_2U&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2YzZDdjNS0yNGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZQqvFIq6ReCmvyKgf9KjN8dowJzGPdLCeNYqaRrtUg=) _**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
Hint: It’s not good.
| Friends — Josh Hawley has been going around DC acting like he’s a champion for Social Security. **But his record speaks for itself:** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15526?t=6&akid=1682%2E564421%2EIiGM3_) Republican politicians like Hawley had no problem spending trillions on subsidies, bailouts, and tax breaks for Wall Street, Big Tech, and Big Oil — all the industries responsible for stripping our communities for parts. But now, when it comes to fulfilling their promise to working Americans, they squabble over every penny.

**When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect Social Security and give our seniors what they’re owed.** [**If you’re with me, please split your first $10 donation between my grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and Ron Be Gone today.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15527?t=7&akid=1682%2E564421%2EIiGM3_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split evenly between Lucas Kunce and Ron Be Gone immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15533?t=13&akid=1682%2E564421%2EIiGM3_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15534?t=14&akid=1682%2E564421%2EIiGM3_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15535?t=15&akid=1682%2E564421%2EIiGM3_)
**Any politician who says we can’t afford to deliver the American people what they’re owed is a liar.**

When I’m in the U.S. Senate, you’ll never have to wonder if I’m fighting for everyday Americans over the massive corporations tearing our country up — and the corrupt politicians standing in my way won’t have to wonder either.

Let’s flip this seat and take back power for working people across the country.

Thanks for standing with me,

— Lucas Kunce

Team, House Republicans have officially taken control, and they're _already_ threatening MASSIVE cuts to Social Security!

President Obama says Social Security is a promise -- one this nation has kept to _**generations**_ of American seniors -- and we can't let far-right, ultra-MAGA Republicans destroy it!

**We need to prove that we'll NEVER let House Republicans cut millions of Americans' Social Security benefits.** We’ve launched an urgent Democratic petition to demand that Republicans uphold this CRITICAL obligation -- _but we’re still short 28 signatures in Pennsylvania! _

**Please, sign on before midnight:**
[**Add your name now to defend Social Security from House Republican threats >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11602?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230212-BreakingNews-HouseSocialSecuritySignOnV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230212-BreakingNews-HouseSocialSecuritySignOnV1-Pros-sl1&akid=9797%2E9716520%2EgkOo9e)
